title: C# Developer - Remote
description:
**Job Title:** C#


**Job Type:** Contractor


**Location:** Remote


**Job Summary:**


Join our customer's team as an expert C# engineer and play a pivotal role in an innovative AI agent project. As a vital contributor, you will leverage your expertise to train AI models and shape intelligent systems. This fully remote position is perfect for driven professionals passionate about creating transformative technology.


**Key Responsibilities:**


* Develop, implement, and maintain robust C# applications for AI agent solutions.


* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and optimize AI model architectures.


* Utilize strong back-end or fullstack capabilities to ensure high-performance and scalable solutions.


* Analyze project requirements and deliver clean, efficient, and well-documented code.


* Enhance AI training processes by providing expert input and innovative solutions.


* Communicate effectively with team members, sharing insights and technical updates.


* Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance during AI model training and deployment.


**Required Skills and Qualifications:**


* Expert-level proficiency in C# programming.


* Over 4 years of professional experience in software development.


* Demonstrated expertise in back-end or fullstack engineering.


* Strong written and verbal communication skills with an emphasis on clarity and collaboration.


* Experience working in remote team environments.


* Track record of delivering complex technical projects efficiently.


* Ability to work autonomously and proactively address challenges.


**Preferred Qualifications:**


* Prior experience contributing to AI or machine learning projects.


* Familiarity with training, fine-tuning, or evaluating AI models.


* Exposure to modern cloud platforms or distributed systems.

title: Frontend Developer
description:
Etraveli Group is a leading global flight technology provider, specializing in flight sales and offering flight content delivery and fintech products. We are here to solve complexity, by connecting millions of flights and travelers across the globe, from search and selection to trip and beyond.
  
We partner with major global platforms such as Booking.com, Google Flights, Skyscanner, and Kayak, providing seamless flight booking and related services. Our B2B portfolio includes a separate fintech entity with its flagship product, PRECISION, a risk management solution, Sweden’s leading flight comparison site Flygresor.se, Tripstack, our B2B Flights as a Service Provider and world leader in virtual interlining, and Wenrix, the embedded AI platform for flights. We also operate our own online travel agency brands including Gotogate, Mytrip, and Flightnetwork.
  
Every day we strive to make the world smaller for our customers and bigger for our people. Our diverse team of more than 3200 passionate professionals is what makes us the industry’s tech wonder and the best in the world at what we do.
  
Major offices in Sweden (HQ), Greece, India, Canada, Israel, Poland, UK, and Uruguay.
  
The Role
  
We are looking for two Frontend Developers to join our Ancillary domain. While you will be embedded in two different feature teams, you will share the same mission: enhancing the value of every booking through a seamless, high-conversion add-on experience.
  
The Ancillary domain is responsible for everything Etraveli Group sells beyond the core travel booking. This includes high-impact products such as added luggage, seat selection, flexible tickets, and travel insurance.
  
Our domain is a fast-paced environment consisting of six feature teams and one dedicated tech team, distributed across two geographical locations. We handle complex logic that sits at the intersection of user experience and diverse global travel provider requirements.
  
Day-to-Day Responsibilities
  
**Technical Influence:** Contribute to frontend architecture, reusable components, and engineering best practices across teams
  
  

**Feature Development:** Design, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack features that allow customers to customize their travel experience with ease
  
  

**Modern Frontend Execution:** Build intuitive, responsive interfaces using React and TypeScript, ensuring high performance and a "mobile-first" approach
  
  

**Collaboration:** Work closely with Product Owners, UX Designers, and fellow engineers in an Agile/Scrum environment to move features from ideation to production
  
  

**Quality & Testing:** Write clean, testable code and participate in peer code reviews to maintain our high standards for reliability and security
  
  

**Continuous Improvement:** Contribute to the domain's tech stack evolution, participating in architectural discussions and troubleshooting production issues within a "you build it, you run it" culture
  
  

Requirements
  
**Full Stack Proficiency:** Proven experience in both frontend and backend development, with a strong emphasis on building high-traffic, customer-facing web applications
  
  

**Core Tech Stack:** Professional experience with React (or similar modern JS frameworks) and Java (Spring Boot preferred)
  
  

**Frontend Fundamentals:**  

Deep understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and Modern JavaScript
  
  

Semantic, accessible UI development
  
  

Strong professional experience with TypeScript
  
  

Experience with state management libraries (e.g. React Hook Form, Redux)
  
  

Familiarity with build tools like Webpack
  
**API Design:** Our primary focus is GraphQL APIs, though a solid understanding of RESTful API design principles is essential
  
  

**Quality & Accessibility:**  

A strong commitment to Web Accessibility standards
  
  

Proven experience writing Unit, Integration, and End-to-End tests (we currently use Playwright)
  
**Communication:** Fluency in English and the ability to explain complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
  
  

**Mindset:** A proactive problem-solver who enjoys working in a flat, collaborative hierarchy and thrives within the fast-moving environment of a scaling tech company
  
  

Benefits
  
At the Etraveli Group Gothenburg office, you will be part of +200 people, all with different cutting-edge skills and personalities. Our shared ambition, passion, and strong work ethic are what drive us toward the same goals. This foundation allows us to value our individual differences, which we believe are precisely what make us a strong team. With us you can enjoy:
  
Our office is located in Merkurhuset in Gothenburg, a few steps away from public transport and lunch restaurants.
  
  

We work on a hybrid-model where you can choose to work two days from home and you have two weeks per year that you can choose to work from a remote location
  
  

We love gaming and after work activities.
  
  

We know the value of personal development and continuous training.
  
  

Hackathons and Dev Weeks - We believe in promoting creativity and trying new things.
  
  

Healthcare allowance – Each employee receives a maximum allowable amount each year according to the Swedish Tax Agency to spend on health-promoting activities such as a gym card, massage etc.
  
  

Pension and health insurance – Through partners we offer a comprehensive pension and health insurance so that you can get help quickly in case of an accident.
  
  

Daily breakfast – To kick the day off just right, breakfast is available at the office every morning.
  
  

As part of this recruitment process, we will be conducting background checks. You will be able to read more information and give your consent to this process in the application form.
  
Diversity disclaimer
  
At Etraveli Group we value diversity; we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds. During hiring, we are committed to ensure equality and promote diversity in the workplace at every selection stage. As such, we provide the same opportunities for all candidates regardless of race, religion or belief, gender, nationality, ethnicity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic protected under any anti-discrimination law or regulation.

title: We Are Hiring: Product Developer – Plant-Based Food
description:
**We Are Hiring: Product Developer – Plant-Based Food**

 **Location: Tingsryd, Sweden**

**Position Type: Full-Time, Temporary replacement role (approx. 1 year)**

**Department: Product Development**

  

We are looking for a Product Developer for a temporary position (approximately one year), with a passion for plant-based innovation. In this role, you will join a dedicated team working to develop and scale up high-quality food products that meet modern consumer expectations.

 **Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and refine plant-based products with strong sensory and culinary performance
* Apply food science principles to ensure product quality, stability, texture, and taste
* Conduct market research to identify trends, consumer needs, and development opportunities
* Ensure compliance with food regulations and labelling requirements
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams including sourcing, production, marketing, and sales
* Conduct sensory evaluations, shelf-life testing, and cost analysis
* Document and follow up on all steps in the product development process

 **Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Food Science, Culinary Arts, Nutrition, or a related field
* 3–5 years of experience in plant-based product development
* Strong understanding of ingredient functionality, emulsification, and food chemistry
* Experience with food safety regulations and quality assurance
* Excellent project management and communication skills
* Structured, detail-oriented, and proactive
* Proficient in both written and spoken - Swedish and English

 **Preferred Qualifications**

* Experience with plant-based drinks, cooking products and or nutritional products
* Skills in sensory evaluation methodologies

 **What We Offer**

* Comprehensive health and wellness benefits
* Opportunities for professional growth and continuous learning
* A collaborative and innovative working environm

 **Why Choose Fazer?**


At Fazer, you’ll be part of an inspiring work environment where innovation, collaboration, and personal growth are valued. You’ll work alongside passionate colleagues in a dynamic organization that constantly seeks to improve its products, processes, and ways of working. We offer a stable and supportive workplace with competitive benefits and strong opportunities for career advancement.

 **Ready for a Tasty Job?**


Apply now and bring your passion for food innovation to Fazer.


We look forward to receiving your application by May 25, 2026. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, so don’t wait too long to submit yours.

 *Med fokus på matupplevelser, gör Fazer det möjligt att njuta av dagens bästa stunder. Vår mission, Mat med mening, bygger på vårt unika över 130-åriga arv, djupa konsumentinsikter och innovationer för att skapa hållbara matlösningar för framtiden. Med våra ca 5 000 engagerade medarbetare fokuserar vi på konsumentprodukter, vår direkt till konsument-riktade verksamhet i Nordeuropa och export till mer än 40 länder. Vår verksamhet följer Fazers uppförandekod som baserar sig på koncernens värderingar och FN-initiativet Global Compact. Fazer-koncernens omsättning 2023 uppgick till 1,2 miljarder euro.*

*Northern Magic. Made Real.*

*Följ gärna Fazer på* LinkedIn

title: Backend Software Engineer

 The Role
   


 Our Engagement Area in Product Development is growing and we are now looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join! Engagement at Betsson Group ensures our customers come back for more. It’s all about loyalty. We provide a world class customer experience beyond the game play featuring Tournaments, Dynamic personalized campaigns and much more! 
 


  


 You will be part of preparing our journey to containerization, increasing the scalability of our systems while also maintaining their high quality. To accommodate new requirements, we are constantly re-evaluating our systems design and working on exciting new features.

* SQL Server and NoSQL databases
  
* Unit testing frameworks

 We can offer you an environment full of ambition and passion. One day is never like the other as the only constant is change, to the better, to the greater. We strive to be the best in whatever field we choose to play on, and we make sure to have fun along the way!

title: Frontend Developer
description:
****Why choose Coody****
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility** 
 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
****What you’ll be doing****
 As a
 **Senior Front-end Developer** 
 at Coody, you’ll help build and scale new and existing products with real end-to-end ownership of the service, the code, and the outcomes. Assignments are typically 6-24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. While your home base is frontend using JavaScript and TypeScript, you’ll sometimes work across the full tech stack (e.g., integrations, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD) to ship complete solutions. You’ll design and build scalable, robust frontend applications, contribute to architecture and testing/automation, and play an active role in a teams of different sizes.
   

  

**Who you are** 
 We are seeking a
 **Frontend Engineer with at least 8+ years of experience** 
 . You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:
   

  

* At least 8+ years of experience using TypeScript and Javascript.
* Solid skills in modern libraries and frameworks such as Next.js, React, Vue.js, Svelte, Node, NestJS, Angular, Express.js, Solid, React Native.
* A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Based in Sweden: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).
* Ability to start immidiately.


****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you’ll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive, tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We’re a
 **diverse community of ambitious tech professionals** 
 , representing more than
 **14 nationalities** 
 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,
 **explore our Employee Handbook** 
 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

**How to apply** 
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: Game developer
description:
We are now looking for the best game developer to join us! You have the chance to be a part of creating the best casino games in the online slot industry!
   

  

**Job Description**
* Design, develop and maintain Casino Games for both desktop and mobile browsers
* The technologies you primarily will work with are HTML5, WebGL, Typescript, Pixi, GSAP and Javascript.
* In a team environment that consists of product management, graphic artistry, sound creation, server development and game mechanics, you will contribute to deliver the best casino games in the market today.
* Your main responsibilities are to make the game graphics come alive with spectacular animations, game flow, game mechanics and sounds according to a result delivered by our game servers.


 Who you are
   

  

* You are a Master Google Searcher that have Stackoverflow as your absolute favourite web site.
* You have practical experience of working with OOP in some language and you have a pragmatic approach to software development.
* Taking on technical challenges and solving them is something you take pride in.
* Quality, not only of the code you write, but the delivered system is important to you.
* You thrive in an environment where you are responsible for your code and take ownership of changes from editor to production system.


 Beneficial skills
   

  

* Working experience of mobile browsers and knowledge about their limitations and how they work in different ways is a big plus.


 Who we are
   

  

 We are the best and fastest growing slot provider in the world with the operator and product in focus, and the mobile future on our minds. Nolimit is a team of experienced professionals from the gambling industry in Stockholm, Sweden, Malta and Gurugram, India. Our company has derived from hands on work at some of the most successful gambling software providers and operators over the last 15 years. Our mission is to offer a fast, reliable and flexible team that cooperates with the best operators in the world, taking gambling to the next level.
   

  

 We have a clean code high performance modern mini/micro service portable system platform for mobile and desktop that is 100 % under our own control. Since we have our own platform, this allows us to deliver special features and smooth, customizable marketing campaigns that are tailored to the operator's specific needs. We think it's time for a new angle to the gambling software industry – one where the product is in focus and we fully engage their promotion, marketing and country manager system/activities with our games. Nolimit work with customers on a global scale and the largest gambling operators in the world have our games everywhere.
   

  

 Nolimit City, Stockholm based development team. We provide you with your choice of OS and IDE.
   

  

 Send your application to hr-sweden@nolimitcity.com
   

  

 http://www.nolimitcity.com

title: Frontend Developer - Team Communication
description:
**THE OPPORTUNITY IN A NUTSHELL**
**You?** 
 A self-driven and curious developer who loves building seamless user experiences and isn't afraid to dive into the "why" behind the tech.
   

  

**Role?** 
 Frontend Developer, joining our Team Communication, where you’ll own the messaging experience for millions of users across the Nordics.
   

  

**Tech stack?** 
 Primarily React, JavaScript /TypeScript, Lit/Web Components, and WebSockets, Kubernetes, Github Actions, Miro. (Bonus points for Java/Kotlin & Kafka!)
   

  

**Company?** 
 Vend, home of FINN, Blocket, Tori, Oikotie, DBA & Bilbasen, where millions of people across the Nordics connect to find what they need, whether it’s a job, a home, a way to move, or a fresh start.
   

  

**Location?** 
 Join us in our Oslo or Stockholm office with the flexibility to work 3 days per week remotely!
   

  

**Why us?** 
 You join a highly social, cross-border team where well-being is our priority and every voice carries weight. We offer the space to experiment with AI at scale. Our mission is to be the best company in the Nordics for AI learning and experimentation, and we want you to help us lead that charge!
   

  

*Sounds like your cup of tea? Check out the details below!*
**WHO ARE YOU?**
* You bring hands-on, versatile experience in frontend development from complex technical environments,
* You are a master of JavaScript/TypeScript and React, but you’re also excited to work with Lit/Web Components, WebSockets, and our Podium micro-frontend framework, Vite, TanStack Query (React Query), Vitest, and Cypress.
* While the role is front-end heavy, you have the "technical curiosity" to peek under the hood at the backend (Java/Kotlin) to understand how data flows through the entire inbox system.
* You have an investigative approach to tools like Claude or GitHub Copilot: you actively look for ways to automate the routine parts of maintenance and suggest innovative ways AI can enhance our products and applications.
* You’re an adaptable, cross-border communicator in English: Because our team is split between Oslo and Stockholm and represents many nationalities, clear and thoughtful English is your primary work language.
* You are self-driven and solution-oriented and don't wait for a perfectly groomed Jira ticket to make a move. You’re the one spotting the gaps between our web and app experiences and taking the initiative to map out a solution, rather than just maintaining the status quo.


**WHAT’S THE JOB LIKE?**
 As our new Frontend Developer, you’re joining Team Communication, the squad that builds and maintains the messaging infrastructure for our top Nordic brands: FINN, Blocket, Tori, and DBA. You’re part of providing a secure and seamless chat experience for buyers and sellers within each of these marketplaces.
   

  

 Our mission is to ensure millions of users connect, negotiate, and close deals without friction. We are currently in an exciting phase, reshaping and scaling our product portfolio to meet the growing business needs from professional sellers on the platform.
   

  

 You focus mainly on
   

  

* Scaling for Business: Together with the team, you will build sophisticated frontend interfaces that handle high-volume communication and professional-grade features.
* The "Web-to-App" Bridge: Working hand-in-hand with our Stockholm-based designer and iOS/Android developers, you map the gaps between our platforms. Your goal is to ensure that a user having a conversation using the app has the same high-quality experience when they switch to the web.
* Pioneering AI Workflows: You help the team find the "sweet spot" for Claude and other AI integrations, both to enhance the messaging product itself and to optimize our own developer velocity.
* Collaborative Engineering: You are part of a 9-person cross-functional squad. You spend your week in close sync with your managers, and a tight-knit group of developers, covering frontend, backend and apps. We value "shared ownership," meaning you have a seat at the table for product discovery, not just execution.


**A FEW WORDS FROM MARI, Engineering Manager**
*“Hi, I am Mari Halvorsen, Engineering Manager for Team Communication.*
*Coming from a developer background myself, I believe in giving my team the space to experiment and participate in decision-making. I strive to lead with empathy and giving trust, in return for ownership and accountability.*
*Our team is currently 9 people (a mix of introverts, extroverts, and many nationalities). We put well-being as priority number one. We work hard, but we also make sure to have fun with digital game sessions and regular cross-country visits. I value honesty, flexibility, and a healthy work-life balance above all else.*
*If this resonates with a role and a team you would thrive in, we want to hear from you!”*
 Want to get a feel for our culture and what drives us? Take a peek behind the scenes at our Career Page!
   

  

**GOT YOUR ATTENTION?**
**Let us hear from you!** 
 Make sure to apply by
 **Sunday** 
**April 26, 2026** 
 .
   

  

 → You can choose whether to send your cover letter or go through some questions we prepared to get to know you better!
   

  

 We will start with the first rounds of interviews after the application period, to give everyone a fair shot.
   

  

**QUESTIONS?**
 Mari Halvorsen (Engineering Manager) is happy to provide information about the daily work and the team. Reach out via LinkedIn or email (mari.halvorsen(at)vend.com).
   

  

 For any additional questions about the process, I, Alessia Porazzi, Talent Acquisition Partner, am here for you on LinkedIn or email (alessia.porazzi(at)vend.com).
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
* First step with Talent Acquisition Partner, Alessia (your background, motivation & vision, practicalities, Vend as an employer)
* Second meeting with Engineering Manager, Mari (diving deeper into your background & skills, role goals & expectations)
* Quick psychometric assessment + final meeting with the team (case scenario, diving deeper into your team's vision and way of thinking)
* Reference check and offer!

title: React Developer
description:
Join a high growth fintech company in Stockholm building scalable, user focused products used by a growing customer base. Technology sits at the core of the business, with a strong focus on performance, usability, and continuous improvement. You’ll be part of a senior engineering team shaping high quality frontend experiences with real impact.
 



  





 This is a hybrid role with
 **3 days per week** 
 in the Stockholm office, working closely with product, design, and backend teams in a fast paced, collaborative environment.
 



  





**Must haves:** 



* 7+ years of experience in software development
* Strong experience building frontend applications with React
* Solid understanding of JavaScript or TypeScript
* Experience working with APIs and integrating backend services
* Strong focus on clean, maintainable, and scalable frontend code
* Eye for detail with a strong focus on UX and performance
* Ability to work closely with product and design teams
* Fluent English communication skills



  





**Nice to haves:** 



* Experience within fintech, payments, or financial systems
* Familiarity with modern frontend tooling and frameworks
* Experience with state management solutions and component architecture
* Knowledge of CI/CD and modern DevOps practices
* Exposure to high scale, high traffic applications



  





**What you’ll be doing:** 



* Building and maintaining high quality frontend applications using React
* Developing responsive, performant, and user friendly interfaces
* Collaborating closely with designers and backend engineers
* Improving performance, scalability, and usability of existing products
* Contributing to frontend architecture and best practices

title: Back End Developer
description:
We are looking to hire a Senior Backend Engineer working with Golang for one of Stockholm's leading in house companies that are continually changing their industry!
 



  





 As a Backend Engineer you will be an integral part of a highly creative team focused on building powerful and reusable infrastructure and backend components for our product.
 



  





 Here you will have the opportunity to take initiative and drive finding solutions to exciting challenges, building the services that power our systems, making sure they scale and continuously improve on them.
 



  





 Example Of Responsibilities:
 



 • Design, build, and operate features, services, and developer tools
 



 • Own matchmaking systems in production, ensuring scalability, reliability, and performance
 



 • Drive technical design and architecture of matchmaking flows across client, game server, and backend services
 



 • Collaborate with other backend services, gameplay, and infrastructure teams to resolve matchmaking challenges
 



 • Partner with data analysts to evaluate matchmaking quality and drive data-informed improvements
 



  





 We would love if you have:
 



 • Professional experience with Go and modern backend technologies (6+ years ideally)
 



 • A creative and curious mindset with a passion for interactive experiences, and new technologies
 



 • Solid understanding of designing, building, and operating complex distributed systems, with performance, scalability, and observability in mind
 



 • Comfortable working across domains, including backend services, data analytics, infrastructure, and observability
 



 • A collaborative mindset with strong communication skills and the ability to work effectively in cross-disciplinary teams
 



 • Interest in taking initiatives and driving finding solutions to exciting challenges
 



  





 Please note that this role is 3-4 days a week in the office in Stockholm and candidates must have a valid working permit or citizenship to be considered.
 



  





 Sound interesting?
 



 Apply today!

 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:

 . No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.

 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
****What you’ll be doing****
 As a
 **Senior Fullstack Developer** 
 at Coody, you’ll help build and scale new and existing products with real end-to-end ownership of the service, the code, and the outcomes. Assignments are typically 6-24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. You’ll design and build scalable, robust frontend applications, contribute to architecture and testing/automation, and play an active role in a teams of different sizes.

 We are seeking a
 **Fullstack** 
**Typescript Engineer with at least 8+ years of experience** 
 . You must have a proven ability to get things done. Here’s what we’re seeking:
   

  

* At least 8+ years of experience using JavaScript and TypeScript
* Solid skills in modern libraries and frameworks such as Node, Next.js, React, Vue.js, Svelte, NestJS, Angular, Express.js, Solid, React Native.
* A degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Based in Sweden: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.

****This is Coody****
 We’re one of Sweden’s fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting, combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.

 We’re a

 .
   

  

**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy** 
 . Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you’re curious to see how this works in practice,

 and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

**How to apply** 
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criterias? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: Senior Software Engineer Backend
description:
**Join Truecaller – The place where innovation meets impact!** 




  





 Truecaller's mission is to build trust in communication by making it safer, smarter, and more efficient. Born in Sweden, trusted by the world, and here’s why we stand out:
 



  




* We are trusted by over 450 million active users every month across 190+ countries
* We identify over 15 billion calls daily, helping users avoid spam and scams
* We are powered by a team of 450+ employees from 45+ nationalities



  





 We always look for people who take initiative, own their work, and keep raising the bar. An entrepreneurial mindset matters here, especially when it turns bold ideas into real actions. We stay collaborative and focused, always searching for smarter paths forward. If you want to make an impact and grow with a team that inspires millions, you’ll fit right in.
 



  





**The role:** 




  





**We at the Calling team** 
 own everything within the calling domain – designing, building, and optimizing features that make calling more seamless, reliable, and secure for our 450+ million users worldwide. We operate one of the world’s leading communication platforms for voice calls, allowing you to work at a massive scale, solve complex engineering challenges, and shape how millions of people connect every day.
 



  





 As a
 **Senior Software Engineer, Backend,** 
 you will collaborate with a dedicated team responsible for one of Truecaller's critical systems: the calling platform. This includes the services to facilitate and optimize: voice calls, smart dialing, and real-time communication for over 450 million users worldwide.
 



  





 You will own the end-to-end calling domain-building, transforming, and optimizing features to ensure every connection is seamless and secure. Working at this massive scale, you’ll solve complex engineering challenges and directly shape how millions of people connect every day.
 



  





**What you’ll do:** 



* Design and develop high-volume, low-latency services and cope with the challenge of working in a distributed environment.
* Operate mission-critical services at high availability.
* Collaborate across business units and drive solutions.
* Explore new solutions and technologies.
* Build a scalable and reliable system.



  





**What you bring in:** 



* 5+ years of experience with Scala, Java, or Go
* Experience of working with scalable, highly available, real-time distributed systems
* Experience of working with non-relational databases
* Good understanding of data structures and algorithms
* Mentoring/ Leadership skills
* Excellent communication skills in English.
* Ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.



  





**It would be great if you also have:** 



* Experience building systems in the Google Cloud Platform
* Experience with virtualization environments, e.g., Docker
* Experience with systems for managing containerized applications, e.g., Kubernetes
* Experience with Cassandra and Kafka.



  





**What we offer:** 




 We support growth through learning resources, leadership programs, mentoring, and real hands-on work. People can move between teams and projects to build new skills and keep things interesting. We offer clear internal mobility and a transparent path for progression, with leaders who stay involved and provide guidance throughout the year. In addition, you will benefit from:
 









* **A comprehensive compensation package:** 
 We offer a competitive salary, 30 days of paid vacation, private health insurance, parental leave top-up, pension, and wellness contributions.
* **Modern tools to do your best work:** 
 Choose your preferred computer and phone within our budget, so you can work comfortably and efficiently.
* **A people-focused office culture:** 
 We value in-person collaboration and follow an office-first model, with some flexibility. Our offices offer a vibrant environment with opportunities to learn, connect, and recharge, from breakfast, lunch, and well-stocked snack stations and quiet spaces to team activities such as movie nights, tech meetups, and cultural events. There's something for everyone.
* **Truecaller’s “Lab Days” offer a space for imagination:** 
 5 times per year for 3 days, where everyone steps away from their normal tasks to explore new, bold ideas and build things they’ve always wanted to. It’s a space where curiosity leads the way, and prototypes take shape. Some concepts even make it into production, and a few have grown into real features used by millions today. Lab Days allow you to be creative, learn fast, and help shape Truecaller's future.



  





**Come as you are:** 




 Truecaller is committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. We believe that a wide range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences strengthens our products and our culture. No matter where you're from, what language you speak, or how you identify, we value what makes you unique and would love to get to know you.
 




  





 Check out Life at Truecaller - Behind the code:
 
 https://www.instagram.com/lifeattruecaller/
 




  





**Sounds like a great opportunity?** 




  





 We will fill the position as soon as we find the right candidate, so please send your application as soon as possible. As part of the recruitment process, we will conduct a background check.
 



  





**We only accept applications in English.**

 Assignments are typically 6–24 months, and as a consultant you’re expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one. You’ll take ownership of gameplay features from concept to implementation, working closely with designers, QA, and production to ensure systems are both technically sound and fun to play.

 with strong technical depth and a passion for building systems that create meaningful player experiences. You have a proven ability to take ownership, solve complex problems, and contribute to a team at a high level.
