KPMG offers a comprehensive internal training and development program with the opportunity to develop within your areas of interest.
   

  

 ,
   

  

 We are seeking a professional with a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Information Technology, Accounting, Finance, Taxation, or a related field. Professional certifications such as CPA, CA, or an equivalent designation are highly preferred. The ideal candidate will have more than five years of hands-on experience in tax technology, data management, or a related role, preferably gained within leading consulting firms—such as the Big Four—or multinational corporations. A proven track record in leading and implementing tax technology or data management solutions is considered a strong advantage.
   

  

 A solid understanding of tax data management and compliance processes, along with familiarity with tax technology platforms, is essential. This includes experience with data analytics tools, data lakes, data warehouses, and data engineering platforms such as Databricks, as well as tax provision and compliance software. The candidate should demonstrate excellent analytical skills and possess a deep understanding of financial data, accounting systems, and financial operations.
   

  

 We value individuals who are passionate about driving digital transformation in finance and tax, and who bring a forward-thinking mindset with a willingness to challenge established processes in order to foster innovation. Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills are critical for success in this role. Moreover, the ability to identify and act upon new business opportunities, build and maintain client relationships, and collaborate effectively within cross-functional teams is essential.
   

  

**Do you want to know more?**
 In this process KPMG is working with Level Recruitment. To apply, please click the apply button. If you have further questions don´t hesitate to contact recruitment consultant Dennis Pater at +46 735 58 89 34 or Christian Smith at +46 8-120 50 410. Please note that we need your application written in English. We will interview ongoingly so please register your application as soon as possible.

title: Customer Success Manager (Japanese Speaking) カスタマーサクセスマネージャー
description:
Summary
   


 We are seeking a
 **Customer Success Manager** 
 to join our growing global connected services team in Stockholm, Sweden. In this role, you will build and maintain strong, long-term customer relationships, acting as a trusted advisor and primary bridge between the customer and internal teams. You will ensure customer success by driving value realization, service excellence, and continuous improvement across all engagements.
 



 The role also include shaping customer success strategies, influencing cross-functional alignment, and proactively driving continuous improvement initiatives.
 



 You will play a critical role in maximizing customer lifetime value, reducing churn, and positioning the organization as a trusted partner.
   




 About KDDI
   


 We are a global Top 10 telecommunications pioneer and a Global Fortune 500 company providing our international customer base with data centers, networks, content delivery, system integration, and more. We connect vehicles from several of the world's largest Automotive OEMs, as well as mobility and IoT programs across the globe. Our industry-leading
 **Telehouse** 
 data center provides colocation at over 40 sites in 23 cities across 12 countries, including London, New York, Frankfurt, and Shanghai. Leveraging our strengths as a telecom provider, we combine
 **IT and network expertise** 
 to deliver secure, scalable, and stress-free connectivity for our customers.
   




 Responsibilities
   

* Develop and maintain strong relationships with customers and key stakeholders across functional interfaces.
* Act as the primary point of contact for all customer-facing operational and tactical matters.
* Drive customer success by ensuring adoption, value realization, and alignment with customer objectives.
* Deliver regular service reviews, including SLA performance, KPIs, and customer health metrics.
* Manage customer communications, expectations, escalations, and overall satisfaction.
* Proactively identify risks, issues, and opportunities for improvement, and drive resolution.
* Lead problem management and continuous improvement initiatives across services and projects.
* Provide regular reporting on account status, service performance, and ongoing initiatives.
* Collaborate with internal teams (Sales, Product, Support, Engineering) to deliver seamless service.
* Coordinate and manage cross-functional escalations and ensure timely resolution.
* Monitor incidents, changes, and service requests, ensuring adherence to SLAs and timelines.
* Engage in critical and high-priority incidents, coordinating communication and stakeholder updates.
* Facilitate customer meetings, including service reviews, roadmap discussions, and operational syncs.
* Identify growth opportunities and support account expansion in collaboration with Sales.
* Support after-hours escalations, major incidents, and planned service activities when required.


 Knowledge and Skills
   

 Technical Skills
   

* Understanding of Wireless/Cellular technologies (4G/5G, eSIM, Packet Core)
* Familiarity with IoT services and platforms
* Experience with incident management and ticketing systems


 Soft Skills
   

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in Japanese and English is mandatory.
* Strong stakeholder management and relationship-building capabilities.
* Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, dynamic, and ambiguous environment.
* Strong problem-solving, analytical, and decision-making skills.
* Proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement and customer outcomes.
* Strong collaboration, negotiation, and conflict resolution skills.


 Requirements
   

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Information Technology, Telecommunications, Computer Science, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 5+ years of experience in Customer Success, Service Delivery, Account Management, or Customer facing technical support roles.
* Proven track record of managing and growing customer relationships.
* Strong understanding of ITIL principles and service management best practices.
* Experience working in telecom, connectivity (4G/5G), IoT, or related domains is preferred.
* Strong business and technical acumen, with the ability to translate technical issues into business impact.
* Experience with CRM tools, service management platforms, and reporting systems would be an added advantage.

title: Account Executive - Norwegian Speaking
description:
Upsales is a bootstrapped company with big ambitions, known for our high-performing team, relentless curiosity, and a culture that challenges conventional thinking. From product to sales, we’re obsessed with creating real value for our customers and building software that actually moves the needle.
   

  

**Account Executive - Norwegian Speaking** 
 We’re looking for a world-class Account Executive to join our high-performance sales team in
 **Stockholm** 
 , the spearhead of our growth engine. This is a chance to be part of one of the most effective AI software sales teams in the Nordics, built around high ownership, high ambition, and a shared belief that we’re building something truly category-defining.
   

  

 This role comes with
 **clear ownership of the Norwegian market** 
 . You will be responsible for driving new business growth in Norway and establishing Upsales as a leading AI revenue platform among Norwegian B2B companies.
 **The role is based in Stockholm** 
 .
   

  

 This isn’t a customer success role. And it’s not just about closing deals. This is strategic, consultative selling at the highest level, working closely with C-level stakeholders as a trusted advisor, a growth partner, and a commercial leader.
   

  

 You’ll be supported by a high-performing team of solution engineers and go-to-market colleagues, but you own the outcome. Success in this role requires more than hitting quota. It requires curiosity, strategic thinking, and the ability to connect the dots between a company’s challenges and the potential of Upsales AI.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who wants to sell at the highest level, who thrives in fast-paced, high-performance teams, and who’s motivated by the opportunity to help reshape how companies grow, starting with the Norwegian market.
   

  

**AI first mindset** 
 We’re not looking for someone who simply uses AI. We want someone who weaponizes it. You treat tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI copilots as force multipliers, allowing you to deliver at a level and speed others can’t match. For you, AI isn’t an add-on. It’s the default operating system for how you think, work, and lead. You’re relentlessly curious about new capabilities and push the limits of what’s possible, turning AI into a competitive advantage for yourself, Upsales, and our customers. This is a role for someone with real ambition, someone who wants to set a new standard for efficiency, precision, and impact in the age of AI.
   

  

**Upsales Culture** 
 At Upsales, our culture isn’t something written on the walls — it’s how we operate every day. We believe in high standards, high tempo, and zero politics. Please read our culture deck before applying.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Drive end-to-end new business, from prospecting to negotiation and close, with a primary focus on the Norwegian market.
* Create and execute strategic outbound campaigns toward key Norwegian verticals and segments.
* Engage with CEOs, CROs, and other revenue leaders at Norwegian companies to identify growth opportunities.
* Position Upsales AI as a must-have platform for data-driven sales and marketing teams in Norway.
* Collaborate with product, marketing, and solution engineers to craft winning proposals.
* Build a strong, predictable pipeline and consistently exceed your targets.


**Who We’re Looking For** 
 This isn’t an entry-level role. We’re looking for someone who has already proven they can win at the highest level.
   

  

 You have at least 5 years of experience in complex software sales, ideally selling to C-level decision-makers in mid-market or enterprise environments. You know how to navigate complex sales cycles, align multiple stakeholders, and close strategic deals. More importantly, you’ve done it consistently, and you have the track record to prove it. You’ve not only hit quota, you’ve beaten it, quarter after quarter.
   

  

 You bring sharp analytical thinking and intellectual curiosity to every conversation. A master’s degree from a top-tier university is preferred, but raw horsepower and business acumen matter even more. You ask great questions, challenge assumptions, and bring real insight to your customers.
   

  

 Personality-wise, you’re obsessed with winning, but never at the expense of the team. You take pride in delivering results, but you’re also the kind of person who jumps in to help a teammate close a deal or solve a tough problem. You raise the bar, and bring others with you.
   

  

**Fluency in Norwegian and English, written and spoken, is required.**

title: Internship: Consumption-based accounting, modelling and analysis
description:
**Introduction**
 Join the Cities, Communities and Consumption team at SEI HQ as an intern and contribute to cutting-edge research on consumption-based emissions. You will support the development of the Consumption Compass tool and help generate insights to inform policies for a sustainable and just transition.
   

  

**Project/internship introduction**
 The project Decoding climate footprints – User-centric solutions for bridging climate footprints and climate justice at the local level is seeking an intern to support the next phase of the Consumption Compass (Konsumtionskompassen) .
   

  

 The Consumption Compass is an innovative tool that downscales Sweden’s consumption-based emissions from the national level to postcode level across more than 100 consumption categories. It is widely used by Swedish municipalities and other stakeholders to better understand local consumption patterns and design policies that support more sustainable and equitable lifestyles.
   

  

 The project is now focusing on improving the model and expanding the tool’s functionality. This includes analysing how household carbon footprints relate to socio-demographic variables such as income, education, household composition and housing type. It also includes developing a library of policy measures to support municipalities in reducing consumption-based emissions.
   

  

 As an intern, you will contribute to both quantitative and qualitative work, including data collection, modelling support and statistical analysis, as well as engagement with project partners.
   

  

**Tasks**
* conduct quantitative and qualitative data analysis, including analysing consumption and footprint data and visualizing their results
* supporting model development and validation, including data processing and exploratory analysis (e.g. in Excel, Python)
* testing new versions of the tool and provide structured feedback


 Additional tasks may include:
   

  

* supporting the development of a policy library on measures to reduce consumption-based emissions
* assisting with workshops with project partners, including preparing materials, summarizing discussions and supporting follow-up


 This internship may also be carried out as part of a thesis project.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 You are a student with an interest in sustainable consumption and climate policy. You are studying environmental science, sustainability science, data science, economics or a related field, with a focus on environmental policy, statistics or quantitative social science methods.
   

  

 You have experience working with quantitative data and are comfortable using Excel. Experience with statistical analysis and programming (e.g. Python) is an advantage. Familiarity with carbon footprinting or consumption-based accounting is also an asset.
   

  

 You are collaborative, proactive and able to work independently, with strong organizational skills. As the work focuses on a Swedish context, proficiency in Swedish is highly desirable, particularly for engaging with stakeholders and materials.
   

  

**Skills And Experience**
* currently enrolled in a master’s program
* fluent in English; proficiency in Swedish is highly desirable
* proficiency in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel
* experience with quantitative data analysis
* programming skills (e.g. Python) are an asset
* strong analytical, organizational and time management skills


**Location**
 The internship is based at SEI HQ in Stockholm. The intern is expected to be in the office 1–2 days per week.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We review applications on an ongoing basis, so please submit your application as soon as possible, and no later than 19 April 2026, 23:59 (Stockholm time).
   

  

 Applications should be written in English and include a short CV and cover letter (maximum one page).
   

  

 Please include in your cover letter:
   

  

* what you would like to do and learn during your internship and your strengths related to the role
* how the internship relates to your studies and future plans


 Your CV should include one reference (name, affiliation and contact details).
   

  

**Internships at SEI**
 We aim to attract competent and skilled university students for our internships. Our goal is to support the intern’s development by providing a valuable learning experience in a professional setting. To be an intern you need to be enrolled at a university or university college. The internship should be part of your education. We only offer unpaid internships. Applicants must be fully funded and insured by external sources throughout their time at SEI HQ.
   

  

 All SEI recruitments are based on respect for the individual regardless of gender, gender identity or expression, age, union representation or political opinion, functional variation, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, nationality and marital or parental status.
   

  

**Questions?**
* For questions about the aims of the internship, please contact Katarina Axelsson, Senior Policy Fellow axelsson@sei.org .
* For questions about the recruitment process, please contact Filippa Klintberg, HR Specialist klintberg@sei.org .


**Meet the team**
 Learn more about the Cities, Communities and Consumption team and their work, as well as the Consumption Compass tool and team , as well as related projects, on our website.
   

  

**About SEI**
 Stockholm Environment Institute is an international non-profit research institute that tackles climate, environment and sustainable development challenges.
   

  

 We empower partners to meet these challenges through cutting-edge research, knowledge, tools and capacity building. Scientific quality and integrity are foundations of our work. Partnership is at the heart of our approach, leading to change that lasts.
   

  

 Our work connects science to policy and practice, aiming to drive tangible impacts. It spans climate change, natural resources, water, air, and health, and addresses questions of governance, innovation, finance, poverty, gender equality and social equity.
   

  

 We are committed to transparency and full disclosure of our funding. The Government of Sweden is our largest funder, and we also receive funds from a range of public research funders, philanthropic foundations, bilateral and multilateral development agencies, governments, NGOs and other partners.
   

  

 Through SEI’s HQ and seven centres around the world, we engage with policy, practice and development action for a sustainable, prosperous future for all.

title: Account Executive, Uber Eats, Sweden
description:
**About The Role**
 Restaurants are the heartbeat of Uber Eats, and our Acquisition team is responsible for scaling our footprint in some of the world's most competitive and nuanced markets. Our mission is to identify, pitch, and onboard high-potential local partners that will thrive on our platform and delight customers.
   

  

 In this role, you will navigate the complex, high-stakes reality of B2B sales where there is no one-size-fits-all playbook. You'll need to earn trust fast, manage the resilience needed to handle constant "no's," and solve complex problems without a script. This is for someone who thrives on ownership and is energized by the challenge of building long-term partnerships in a fast-changing environment.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Own the full end-to-end acquisition cycle for prospective restaurant partners, from the first cold call through to negotiation, activation, and early growth support.
* Build relationships by understanding unique merchant business challenges and aligning Uber's value proposition with their specific goals.
* Navigate ambiguity and shifting priorities to unlock value for both the Restaurant Partner and Uber.
* Manage your sales pipeline with urgency and discipline, balancing quick wins with long-term trust-building
* Collaborate across Sales Operations teams to resolve blockers, and ensure a smooth merchant onboarding experience.
* Adapt your approach based on market dynamics and imperfect information, continuously testing new messaging to improve closing techniques.


**What You'll Have**
* Professional experience in B2B sales or business development.
* Proven track-record of conducting high-volume outbound cold calling and independent deal closing.
* Demonstrated resilience and a "go-get-it" attitude in a performance-driven sales environment.
* Fluency in Swedish, and professional proficiency in English.
* Ability to lead negotiations and manage commercial terms independently.
* Experience in the Food Delivery, Hospitality and Travel, Retail or FMCG industry.
* Familiarity with CRM systems like Salesforce
* Experience in a performance based compensation structure

title: Senior Producer
description:
We are looking for a Senior Producer to join an exciting new project early in its development phases. You will get a chance to help build a multi-disciplinary team from the ground up, participate in hiring, establish how the team achieves success and then lead them towards those successes.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Overseeing the development process, managing timelines, resources, scope, and quality
* You are responsible for end-to-end delivery, ensuring predictable project outcomes through effective tracking, risk mitigation, and problem-solving
* You understand pipelines, identify bottlenecks, and work systematically to improve efficiencies
* Assume accountability for overall team progress and timely delivery of milestones and other key deliverables.
* Ensure that needed ceremonies (such as stand-up, retros, progress reporting etc) are instituted and conducted.
* Be a champion for your team by removing blockers, optimizing the flow of communication, facilitating collaboration and nurturing a sense of shared ownership.
* Establish and continuously evolve workflows and pipelines.
* Participate in hiring for your team and facilitate relaxed but efficient onboarding experiences.
* Identify ways to leverage outsourcing opportunities where sensible
* Assume people management responsibilities for a group of developers, supporting them in their growth and career development. You are accountable for the entire employee journey of your direct reports, from hiring to onboarding, probation period evaluation, all the way to eventual offboarding


**Who You Are**
* At least 5 years experience as a Producer or Project Manager.
* Been involved with at least one game project through a complete development cycle.
* Has led a full or significant part of a multi-disciplinary development team.
* Thorough understanding of agile game development methodologies.
* Experience of common tools of trade such as JIRA, Confluence, Figma etc.
* Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.
* Strong verbal and written communication skills in English.
* Servant-leadership, team-first and collaborative mindset.


 Note: Research shows under-represented groups in the industry might not apply to a job if they don’t check off every requirement. At Avalanche, we’re more about your drive to learn and interest in tackling challenges than what’s on your resume! So don’t stress if you don’t tick every box— shoot us your application anyway! Diverse opinions and different experiences are what make our teams so great, not itemized lists of qualifications.
   

  

**The Stockholm location**
 Our Stockholm office is situated in Södermalm, the beating heart of the city’s game industry. It’s a physical representation of our games – the lush vegetation of Just Cause and theHunter: Call of the Wild meets corroded metal straight out of Mad Max. Our hybrid model requires you to be in the office on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays to foster collaboration and creativity.
   

  

**Our values**
 At Avalanche Studios Group, we create worlds beyond limits. But that’s not exclusive to our games, so we’re committed to developing a diverse and inclusive workplace. All Avalanchers have a shared responsibility to create an open work environment where everyone is treated equally and respectfully. Being part of our world is not contingent on your heritage, your gender, or sexual orientation. It’s all about your passion and creativity.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 To apply for this position, please register below and provide your CV in English. We review applications continuously. All further studio-related information is provided under a non-disclosure agreement.
   

  

 At Avalanche Studios Group we're always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our passionate team, but please note that relocation assistance is not available for this role.

title: Technical CRM Product Owner
description:
Varje vecka når Bauer Media Audio över 61 miljoner lyssnare i Europa genom radio, poddar och digitala ljudplattformar. Bakom sälj- och marknadsorganisationens vardag finns ett affärskritiskt CRM, och nu söker vi dig som tar ägarskapet över det.
 



  





 Det är en roll för dig som trivs i skärningspunkten mellan affär och teknik, är van att översätta komplexa krav till konkreta lösningar och vet hur man navigerar mellan en sälj- och marknadsorganisations behov och ett tekniskt utvecklingsteam. Hos oss jobbar du mitt i en organisation som just nu är i rörelse, med nyutveckling, nya plattformar och nya sätt att nå annonsörer, och där din insats syns direkt i verksamheten.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som Technical CRM Product Owner är du länken mellan vår kommersiella verksamhet och de tekniska team som utvecklar och förvaltar vårt CRM, HubSpot. Du ansvarar för det tekniska produktägarskapet av systemet, driver roadmap, hanterar backlog och säkerställer att integrationer fungerar och byggs på rätt sätt.
 



 I det löpande arbetet hanterar du förbättringar, buggar och ny funktionalitet och koordinerar krav med ett centralt europeiskt utvecklingsteam. Du är den som säkerställer att rätt tekniska beslut fattas, att prioriteringar hålls och att krav från olika håll landar rätt. Just nu driver vi även ett spännande projekt där vi tar hem vår CRM-integration till en intern plattform, något du kommer vara central i.
 



  





 Du rapporterar till Head of Data & Systems och samarbetar tätt med sälj, finans och ett centralt CRM-team på nio europeiska marknader.
 



  





**Vi söker dig som har:** 




 · Minst 3 års erfarenhet som produktägare, IT-projektledare eller i en liknande roll mot affärssystem.
 



 · Erfarenhet av att arbeta i gränslandet mellan kommersiell verksamhet och tekniska team.
 



 · God förståelse för integrationer.
 



 · Svenska i tal och skrift.
 



 Meriterande med erfarenhet av just CRM-system, och ett starkt plus med erfarenhet av HubSpot. Erfarenhet från media eller reklamförsäljning är också meriterande.
 



  





**För att trivas i rollen ser vi att du är** 
 snabbrörlig och flexibel, och trivs i en roll där du jonglerar tekniska och kommersiella frågor samtidigt. Du är en skicklig kommunikatör som lyssnar in, kan översätta olika behov till krav och driva saker framåt även när olika intressenter har olika åsikter. Du är lösningsorienterad, noggrann och bekväm med att stödja flera team i en organisation där saker förändras fort.
 



  





**Det här erbjuder vi:** 




 · Hybrid arbetsmodell och två veckors "work from anywhere" per år
 



 · 30 semesterdagar samt 40 timmar extra ledighet per år
 



 · Friskvårdsbidrag (4000kr), friskvårdstimme och årliga hälsokontroller
 



 · Trygghet genom kollektivavtal, tjänstepension och försäkringar
 



  





**Ansökan** 




 Låter det här som en roll för dig? Då vill vi gärna höra ifrån dig. Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande så tveka inte på att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. För frågor, kontakta Linn Forsberg på
 
 linn.forsberg@ants.se
 
 .
 



  





**Om Bauer Media Audio** 




*Bauer Media Audio Sverige är en del av Bauer Media Audio Group, ett familjeägt mediehus i fjärde generationen med verksamhet på nio europeiska marknader och över 150 ljudvarumärken. Vi är marknadsledare på sju av nio marknader och når över 61 miljoner lyssnare varje vecka. I Sverige är vi hem för varumärken som Mix Megapol, Rockklassiker och SportSnack, och driver plattformar som Podplay och Radioplay. Hos oss jobbar du mitt i produkten med live radiosändningar och poddproduktion runt omkring dig varje dag. Det kallar vi ljudeffekten.*

title: Senior databasexpert
description:
Är du redo för en större uppgift och vill bidra till att ge poliser i fält ett informationsövertag och underlätta deras jobb i skarpa lägen? Vi söker en senior databasexpert som vill bidra till att våra system fungerar effektivt i kritiska verksamheter.
   

  

 Arbetsplatsbeskrivning
   

  

 Att jobba på polisens IT-avdelning är att vara en avgörande del i polisens verksamhet. Oavsett om det handlar om att utveckla nya operativa appar, forensisk teknologi, kommunicera via polisradion eller att samla digitala bevis krävs väl fungerande IT-lösningar.
   

  

 På vår enhet Polisiära gemensamma system ansvarar vi för att tillhandahålla gemensamma IT-förmågor och IT-stöd som används inom flera polisiära områden. Vi utvecklar och förvaltar applikationer och tjänster som stödjer operativa, utredande, underrättelse, forensiska- och kanslisystem med information och funktionalitet. Inom Polisiära gemensamma system ryms sektionen för mobil systemutveckling, där tjänsten är placerad. Sektionen består av tre grupper med helhetsansvar för att designa, bygga, testa och förvalta mobila lösningar samt tillhörande backendtjänster och system.
   

  

 Du kommer att ha din placering i moderna lokaler centralt på Kungsholmen i Stockholm, och det finns möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån upp till två dagar i veckan. Som statligt anställd på Polismyndigheten erbjuds du särskilda förmåner kring pension, föräldralön, friskvård m.m.
   

  

 Läs mer om våra förmåner och villkor här
   

  

 Arbetsbeskrivning
   

  

 Du kommer att ingå i ett tvärfunktionellt team som består av erfarna utvecklare med hög teknisk expertis inom systemutveckling. IT-systemen hos Polismyndigheten hanterar stora datamängder och måste vara både snabba, stabila och säkra. I tjänsten kommer du fungera som specialist inom databaser och prestandaoptimering och bidra till att våra system fungerar effektivt i våra kritiska verksamheter.
   

  

 En vanlig arbetsdag kan innehålla:
   

  

* Analys och optimering av databasprestanda
* Förbättra datamodeller och indexstrategier
* Analysera komplexa SQL-frågor och optimera dem
* Arbeta med kapacitetsplanering och skalbarhet
* Bidra i design av databassystem för nya lösningar
* Att medverka vid nyutveckling och stödja med databasexpertis
* Underhåll och vidareutveckling av komplexa system med höga krav på säkerhet och prestanda.
* Aktivt bidra till tekniska riktlinjer och arkitekturval för att utveckla hållbara och effektiva systemlösningar.
* Nära samarbete, exempelvis verksamhetspraktik hos slutanvändare i fält inom den polisiära verksamheten för att förstå deras behov och omsätta dem till tekniska lösningar.


 Vill du veta mer om hur det är att jobba i teamet, läs mer via följande länk där Samuel berättar som sin arbetsvardag:
   

  

*https://polisen.se/jobb-och-utbildning/jobba-hos-polisen/jobb-it-avdelningen/it/samuel-systemutvecklare/*
 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Detta är en möjlighet för dig som har:
   

  

* Relevant högskoleutbildning inom IT eller examen från relevant YH-utbildning. Alternativt motsvarande förvärvad erfarenhet som Polismyndigheten bedömer som likvärdigt
* Flerårig och aktuell erfarenhet av databasnära arbete, antingen i rollen som utvecklare eller databasadministratör.
* Flerårig aktuell erfarenhet av arbete med relationsdatabaser
* Mycket god kunskap i SQL och query-optimering
* Erfarenhet av prestandaanalys och felsökning
* Erfarenhet av datamodellering
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska både tal och skrift


 Anställningen kräver svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

**Meriterande**
 Nedanstående kompetenser/teknikområden är i meriterande, du behöver inte ha kompetens kring allt, då du kommer att få möjlighet att lära dig/få påbyggnad hos oss på plats:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av MySQL och/eller SQLite
* Vana att arbeta i utvecklingsteam
* Erfarenhet av stora datamängder och högtransaktionssystem
* Ett par års erfarenhet av att ha arbetat i en organisation med höga krav på säkerhet, kvalitet och prestandakritiska IT-system. Med god förståelse för IT-säkerhetsprinciper.
* Erfarenhet av design och drift av nära realtidssystem
* Erfarenhet av databasplattformar som SQL Server, MongoDB, PostgreSQL eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av automatisering och DevOps-arbetssätt
* Övervakning och prestandamätning
* Erfarenhet från arbete inom statlig myndighet eller större organisation


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Vi söker dig som är kvalitetsmedveten och arbetar på ett strukturerat sätt för att säkerställa noggrannhet och hög standard i ditt arbete. Du är kommunikativ och trivs med att samarbeta i team, där du bidrar till ett öppet och konstruktivt arbetsklimat. Vi vill att du är skicklig på att analysera och lösa komplexa tekniska problem med en ambition att driva effektiv utveckling som löser användarnas problem och stärker deras förmåga. Nyfikenhet och omvärldsbevakning ser vi som viktiga delar för att trivas hos oss. Vidare är du engagerad i att bidra till samhällets trygghet och motiveras av att göra en meningsfull insats i ditt arbete.
   

  

 Vi vill vi erbjuda dig en plats att utvecklas, både i din tekniska kompetens och som en lagspelare. Vi tror starkt på kunskapsdelning och gemensam iteration för att ständigt ligga i teknisk framkant – samtidigt som vi har det roligt tillsammans.
   

  

 Vi kommer att lägga mycket stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Kontaktpersoner
   

  

 Har du frågor om uppdraget är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef på tel 0105634758
   

  

 Har du frågor om rekryteringsprocessen? Välkommen att kontakta HR-konsult, Sara Petersson, sara-s.petersson@polisen.se
   

  

 Fackliga företrädare
   

  

* Polisförbundet, Sofia Ask, tfn 010-563 87 10
* Seko Polisen, Karna Tillheden, tfn 073-249 04 22
* Saco-S, nås via mejl saco-s.avdelningarna@polisen.se
* ST nås via mejl, st.inom-polisen@polisen.se


 Övrig information
   

  

* Anställningsform: Tillsvidare
* Arbetsort: Stockholm/Kungsholmen
* Arbetstid: Dagtid, flex Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
* Anställningsbenämning: Handläggare
* Funktion: Systemutvecklare


**Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna i ditt ansökningsmejl.** 
 Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Det är därför viktigt att du svarar tydligt och utförligt på frågorna och inte hänvisar till andra handlingar t.ex. CV.
   

  

**Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.**
**Besvara följande urvalsfrågor som en del av din ansökan.**
* Har du en akademisk utbildning inom IT alternativt motsvarande förvärvad kompetens? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv kort och tydligt din utbildning/motsvarande kompetens.
* Har du flerårig och aktuell erfarenhet av att databasnära arbete, antingen i rollen som utvecklare eller databasadministratör? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av databasnära arbete, inklusive vilka typer av arbetsuppgifter du haft och vilken roll du haft i dessa (t.ex utvecklare/DBA).
* Har du flerårig erfarenhet av arbete med relationsdatabaser? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av att arbeta med relationsdatabaser, inklusive vilka och i vilken omfattning (t.ex. utveckling, förvaltning, design eller drift).
* Har du mycket god kunskap i SQL och query-optimering? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din kompetens inom SQL och query-optimering samt hur du vanligtvis arbetar inom detta område.
* Har du erfarenhet av prestandaanalys och felsökning? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av prestandaanalys och felsökning i databasmiljöer samt din roll i detta arbete.
* Har du erfarenhet av databasmodellering? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av datamodellering och hur du brukar arbeta med att ta fram eller vidareutveckla datamodeller.
* Har du mycket goda kunskaper i svenska i både tal och skrift? JA/NEJ
* Har du svenskt medborgarskap? JA/NEJ
* Har du erfarenhet av MySQL och/eller SQLite? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av att arbeta med MySQL och/eller SQLite och i vilken omfattning du arbetat med dessa.
* Har du vana av att arbete i ett utvecklingsteam? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av att arbeta i utvecklingsteam, inklusive hur du samverkat med andra roller.
* Har du erfarenhet av arbete med stora datamängder och högtransaktionssystem? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av att arbeta med stora datamängder eller system med hög transaktionsvolym.
* Har du ett par års erfarenhet av att ha arbetat i en organisation med höga krav på säkerhet, kvalitet och prestandakritiska IT-system med god förståelse för IT-säkerhetsprinciper? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av arbete i miljöer med höga krav på säkerhet, kvalitet och prestanda.
* Har du erfarenhet av design och drift av nära realtidssystem? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv kortfattat din erfarenhet av design och/eller drift av nära realtidssystem.
* Har du erfarenhet av databasplattformar som SQL Server, MongoDB, PostgreSQL eller liknande? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv kortfattat din erfarenhet, samt vilka databasplattformar du har arbetat med.
* Har du erfarenhet av automatisering och DevOps-arbetssätt? JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv din erfarenhet av automatisering och DevOps-arbetssätt kopplat till databaser.
* Har du arbetat med övervakning och prestandamätning av databaser? JA/NEJ, beskriv på vilket sätt du arbetat med övervakning och prestandamätning kopplat till databaser.
* Har du erfarenhet av arbete på starlig myndighet eller en störra organisation? JA/NEJ, om JA, ange vilken myndighet/organisation.


 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället. De uppgifter du lämnar i samband med din ansökan kan användas för att kontakta dig, få information och kallelser samt eventuella anställningshandlingar. Intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan i form av CV och svar på urvalsfrågor via e-post till jobb.na@polisen.se senast den
 **8/5 2026.** 
 Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via den mailadress som anges i annonsen.
 **Märk din ansökan med referensnummer A225.348/2026 i mailets ärendemening.**
 Har du skyddade personuppgifter, referenser eller liknande information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd rekommenderar vi att du kontaktar ansvarig HR-konsult innan du går vidare med din ansökan.
   

  

 En anställning hos Polismyndigheten kan komma att inledas med en provanställning om sex månader.
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) genomförs innan beslut om anställning fattas. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om krigsplacering och säkerhetsprövning under https://polisen.se/krigsplacering och https://polisen.se/sakerhetsprovning
   

  

 Polismyndigheten kommer att behandla dina personuppgifter i enlighet med reglerna i EU:s dataskyddsförordning (2016/679) och annan tillämplig dataskyddsreglering. Läs mer om vår hantering av personuppgifter på https://polisen.se/personuppgifter/rekrytering
   

  

 Din ansökan är en allmän handling enligt offentlighetsprincipen.
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**
 Vi undanber oss samtal och mejl från dig som vill sälja annons- och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Sök jobbet
   

  

 Ansök via e-post

title: Lead Software Engineer, Back End - L5 (Bangkok based - Relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**This position is based in Bangkok, Thailand (Relocation package is provided)**
**Get to Know our Team**
 In Agoda’s Back End Engineering department, we build the scalable, fault-tolerant systems and APIs that host our core business logic. Our systems cover all major areas of our business: inventory and pricing, product information, customer data, communications, partner data, booking systems, payments, and more. These mission-critical systems change frequently with dozens of releases per day, so we must employ state-of-the-art CI/CD and testing techniques in order to make sure everything works without any downtime. We also ensure that our systems are self-healing, responding gracefully to extreme loads or unexpected input. In order to accomplish this, we use state-of-the-art languages like Scala and Go, data technologies like Kafka and Aerospike, and agile development practices. Most importantly though, we hire great people from all around the world and empower them to be successful. Whether it’s building new projects like Flights and Packages or reimagining our existing business, you’ll make a big impact as part of the Back End Engineering team.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 Agoda Platform team is looking for developers to work on mission-critical systems that serve millions of users daily. You will have the chance to work on innovative projects, using cutting-edge technologies, and make a significant impact on our business and the travel industry.
   

  

**In this Role, you'll get to:**
* Architecting and developing highly scalable, mission critical back end systems
* Owning a big chunk of Agoda’s system all the way from the north-star & vision down to the bytecode level
* Enabling impactful collaboration and cross-team projects on big projects, making a dent in the quality of our services, code & architecture
* Providing thoughtful feedback, nurture an inclusive engineering environment, and champion engineering fundamentals. Bring out the best from your fellow engineers.
* Identifying and implementing opportunities for optimization across the technology stack, focusing on cost, efficiency, velocity & dev happiness
* Exhibiting technical leadership throughout the broader organization, conveying complex technical trade-offs to non-techies such as business owners & C-suite executives.


**What you'll Need to Succeed:**
* Overall experience of 10+ years in software engineering roles
* Proven hands-on experience, Experience with owning production services with significant impact on design, development, deployment, monitoring & evolution
* Curiosity, staying a-breast on technological improvements and open source advancement.
* Strong programming skills in languages such as Kotlin, Scala, Java, C#.
* Can perform deep research & take decisions on complex projects. Can easily toggle between running as a lone wolf and also works great as part of a pack
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical details to stakeholders at all levels.
* On top of being an expert in Back End, has understanding of challenges and trade-offs in the entire engineering universe, from Front End/ Mobile to Data Analytics
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.


 #Bengaluru #Hyderabad #Seoul #Berlin #London #Pune #SanFrancisco #SanJose #Seattle #TelAviv #Jakarta #Colombia #NewYork #Vietnam #Madrid #SaoPaulo #Noida #Toronto #Chennai #Singapore #UAE #Sunnyvale #BuenosAires #Austin #Barcelona #Mumbai #Paris #Egypt #Stockholm #Amsterdam #Romania #NewDelhi #Warsaw #Sydney #Bangladesh #Peru #SantaClara #Chicago #Gurgaon #Munich #Montreal #Bangkok #IT #4 #5
   

  

 Please review our Hiring Process Guidelines before your interview — click here to learn how interviewing at Agoda works.
   

  

**Discover More About Working At Agoda**
* Agoda Careers https://careersatagoda.com
* Facebook https://www.facebook.com/agodacareers/
* LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/agoda
* YouTube https://www.youtube.com/agodalife


**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.
   

  

**Disclaimer**
 We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Student Assistant, Events & Activations - Solna
description:
Du kanske har sett vår logga under Stockholms Kulturfestival eller mött oss på Årets kock ?
   

  

 Vill du vara med och bidra till våra events runt om i Sverige? Vi söker en Student Assistant inom events till oss på Arla Foods Sverige.
   

  

 Det här är din chans att lära dig mer om events och omsätta dina kunskaper i praktiken. Du kommer att ingå i Digital & Media-teamet och rapportera till Sponsor & Event-ansvarig för Arla Sverige.
   

  

 Hos oss får du en bred variation av arbetsuppgifter, som vi lovar kommer att utmana dig dagligen samt vara mycket relevant för dina framtida studier. Vi försöker skapa långsiktiga relationer med våra Student Assistants.
   

  

**Hur du kommer påverka** 

 Som Student Assistant arbetar du 15–20 timmar i veckan hos oss på det svenska huvudkontoret i Solna, med hänsyn till din utbildning. Det här är ett uppdrag som omfattar 11 månader och är tänkt att kunna utföras parallellt med universitetsstudier.
   

  

 Som Student Assistant inom event kommer du att få arbeta med varierande uppgifter, bland annat
   

  

* Ingå i ett härligt team där du kommer att arbeta med olika uppgifter relaterade till Arlas många konsument-/B2B-event
* Ha kontakt med många olika interna funktioner samt externa partners och ha exponering mot flera intressenter i branschen
* Hands on där du är med på event
* Administration och koordinering
* Assistera mediateamet i olika projekt
* Ha hand om uppföljning och statistik från event
* Ha hand om inkommande förfrågningar om partnerskap & sponsring
* Ta fram presentationer och underlag till olika projekt
* Kan innebära en del resor inom Sverige


**Vad kommer göra dig framgångsrik**
 Vi söker dig som studerar på universitet eller högskola med minst ett år kvar inom exempelvis marknadsföring, event, projektledning, innovation, kommunikation eller liknande. Du har ett kommersiellt intresse och intresse för dagligvaruhandeln.
   

  

 Vi ser även att du
   

  

* Är utåtriktad och har en stark kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska
* Tycker om det fysiska mötet med konsumenter, är en bra ambassadör för Arlas varumärke och att du har ett affärstänk och entreprenörskap
* Att du gillar projektledning och arbetsstruktur, samtidigt som du har förståelse för att både rutin- och ad hoc-uppgifter ingår i denna roll
* Systemvana inom Excel och PowerPoint samt förmåga att lära dig nya IT-system
* Att du är duktig på och gillar att göra snygga och tydliga Powerpointpresentationer
* Körkort är ett krav


**Vad erbjuder vi?**
* Tjänst som studentassistent, 15–20 timmar per vecka.
* Tidsbegränsad anställning i 11 månader, med start i augusti 2026 till och med juni 2027.


 Som student på Arla Foods kan du gå med i Arla Young Community. Denna dynamiska och mångsidiga gemenskap sammanför talangfulla Student Assistants och praktikanter, och erbjuder möjligheter till nätverkande, kunskapsutbyte och personlig utveckling.
   

  

 Du kan knyta kontakter med likasinnade, få insikter från erfarna yrkespersoner och delta i spännande event. Utvecklas både personligt och professionellt under din tid som Student Assistant på Arla Foods.
   

  

 Arla Foods har kollektivavtal och erbjuder konkurrenskraftiga arbetsvillkor. Säkerhet och arbetsmiljö är högsta prioritet, inklusive slumpmässiga drog- och alkoholtester.
   

  

**Vill du bli en del av oss på Arla?**
 Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande och uppmuntrar dig att söka så snart som möjligt.
   

  

 Observera att ansökningar eller CV via e-post eller direktmeddelanden inte accepteras.
   

  

**Shape the Future of Dairy**
 Arla is a global leader in the dairy industry, committed to enabling good food choices that make life better, providing people with natural, sustainable nourishment, while taking care at every step to ensure Arla is a choice they can feel good about. If you are looking to shape the future with an ambitious global cooperative that truly cares about your growth, where everyone feels valued and empowered, and collaboration is the core of culture, Arla is a choice you can feel good about.
   

  

 Ref. 106671

title: Stödpedagog till gruppbostad LSS
description:
Har du idéer för framtiden och drivs du av utmaningar? I Haninge får du utvecklas tillsammans med trygga kollegor som vill göra skillnad redan idag. Just nu pågår ett av de mest ambitiösa förändringsarbetena i vår kommuns historia. Vi bygger en ny stad, cirka 20 minuter från Söder. Följ med på vår resa. 
   

  





  
   

  





****Välkommen att utvecklas med oss****




**Till Socialförvaltningen söker vi nu en** 
**Stödpedagog på heltid till utförande verksamhet inom funktionsnedsättning/gruppbostad.**




 Tycker du om att skapa förutsättningar och god livskvalité för personer med LSS-insatser och att arbeta för att de ska få ett mer självständigt liv? Är du engagerad och kan arbeta med motivation och aktivt deltagande?
   

  





 Vi söker nu 4 stödpedagoger till våra grupp- och servicebostäder i Handen, Tungelsta, Västerhaninge och Söderby i Haninge.
   

  





****Ditt uppdrag****




 I tjänsten arbetar du i ordinarie verksamhet med uppdrag att arbeta med kvalitet och helhetssyn, brukarfokus, utveckling och samordning utifrån LSS-lagstiftningens, goda levnadsvillkor för den enskilde i form av delaktighet och självständighet. Vi arbetar aktivt för att tillvarata ny teknik som en del i arbetet med självständighet och delaktighet för brukarna.
   

  





 Som stödpedagog är du med och planerar, leder och utvärderar det pedagogiska arbetet samtidigt som du ingår i det vardagsnära arbetet med att ge brukarna stöd i deras dagliga livsföring. Du arbetar självständigt med att exempelvis utveckla arbetssätt kring dokumentation, kartläggning och handlingsplaner, stöttar och vägleder kollegor i olika delar av arbetet, och ser till att evidensbaserade arbetssätt och digitala hjälpmedel används för att öka kvaliteten i verksamheten.
   

  





 Du arbetar aktivt med att sprida kunskap om hur arbetet kring tydliggörande pedagogik kan utformas och har kunskap om metoder som syftar till att göra brukarna delaktiga i stödinsatsernas utformning. Det är viktigt att du som person är lugn och stabil och kan skapa goda relationer.
   

  





****Det här söker vi hos dig****




 För att vara aktuell för tjänsten ska du ha en slutförd yrkesutbildning som stödpedagog, fördjupad kunskap inom verksamhetsområdet, funktionsvariationer, kunskap om lagstiftning, IBIC, MI, tydliggörande pedagogik, alternativ- och kompletterande kommunikation (AKK), lågaffektivt bemötande, goda IT-kunskaper och god svenska.
   

  





 Du har en god samarbetsförmåga, är kommunikativ, självgående, har ett helhetsperspektiv och är reflekterande i din roll. Vi kommer lägga stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet.
   

  





 Vid anställning kommer vi att be om utdrag ur polisens belastningsregister samt ID-kontroll.
   

  





 Arbetstiden är förlagd varannan helg, dag- och kvällstid.
   

  





 Provanställning i 6 månader.
   

  





****Det här kan vi erbjuda dig****




 Ett utvecklande arbete som engagerar och utmanar, tillsammans med kunniga kollegor. Vi har rökfri arbetstid och friskvårdsbidrag. Som stödpedagog ges du möjlighet till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling utifrån verksamhetens behov.
   

  





 Har du frågor om tjänsten kontakta:
   

  





 Felicia Palmgren - Verksamhetschef - Telefon: 08-606 81 57  felicia.palmgren@haninge.se
   

  





 Nina Nilsson - Verksamhetschef - Telefon: 08-606 91 23 nina.nilsson@haninge.se
   

  





 Rebecca Fredriksson - Verksamhetschef - Telefon: 08-606 87 18
   

  





 Gå gärna in på vår hemsida för att läsa mer om våra verksamheter: www.haninge.se
   

  





**Välkommen med din ansökan!**




*I den här rekryteringen har vi redan gjort våra val av annonskanaler och samarbetspartners. Vi undanber oss vänligt men bestämt all form av hjälp med rekryteringen från utomstående aktörer.*




 Anställning kan ske först efter att ett godtagbart registerutdrag från Polisens erhållits.
   

  





 Haninge kommun ser mångfald som en styrka och välkomnar alla sökande. Vår kompetensbaserade rekryteringsmetodik syftar till att fokusera på individens kompetens och därigenom även motverka diskriminering.

title: Recovery and Loss Data Expert
description:
**Job ID: 1236**
 Would you like to work with the development of Nordea’s credit processes and solutions in Group Credit Management? We are now looking for a Recovery and Loss Data Expert in an exciting position combining regulatory and modelling aspects with credit processes and credit data. You will be working in a team responsible for the automated collection of recovery data for all types of customers and will be reporting to the head of Recovery and Loss Data.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Welcome to the Recovery and Loss Data team in Group Credit Management. We are the owner of the recovery and loss data solution for Nordea and drive the development projects in this area. We work closely with our stakeholders and development units in the business areas, regulatory and modelling teams, and our IT partners in this space
   

  

 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**Main responsibilities in this role:**
* Take responsibility for the interpretation of regulatory and modelling requirements on loss data and drive the implementation in development projects.
* Actively drive the process to identify solutions on the automated collection of recovery data.
* Use your business knowledge and analytical skills to deliver on objectives.
* Be self-going and develop good relationships and alignment with your team members and stakeholders in Group Credit Management, Business Areas, Risk Models and with Technology.
* Build up specific competence on processes and applications in the high risk customer area.


**Who You Are**
**This is the right role for you if you:**
* Have hands on experience from working with model development, or development projects preferably in the area of credit processes or credit data in banks.
* Build up and maintain expertise of Nordea’s credit risk agenda; including the understanding of relevant accounting principles, regulatory requirements, systems and data flows.
* Take on responsibility for the job, colleagues, and the value chain working as one team to make a difference.
* Execute planned tasks in order to ensure that targets are met and be able to share experience from execution with colleagues.
* Are flexible within your own role to support the achievements of team results.
* Are self-going with own contribution in the value chain by acting with the customers in mind in all processes to create great customer experiences.
* Create valid decision making proposals to superior, suggesting a solution to a new concrete issue by applying analytical and creative thinking.
* Contribute actively to competence building within own team to support the further development of common skills in the team.


**Your background and skills include:**
* At least 3–5 years of experience in a function where you gained:
+ Superior knowledge or experience of the development of LGD models including regulatory requirements in this area (e.g. EBA guidelines, EGIM and CRR).
+ Understanding of credit processes for household as well as corporate customers, especially high risk credit management (as debt collection or reconstruction).
+ Hands on experience in working with data and preferably coding skills as Python.

* Experience in working with ECB as regulator.
* Senior driver of business requirements and implementation of change.
* Strong communication capacity: comfortable initiating and driving meetings with stakeholders.
* Ability to quickly learn and develop an understanding, interest and passion for banking and credits.
* High level of energy and engagement with an ability to work in a fast-paced environment, with tight deadlines.
* A natural “can do” attitude and a high level of curiosity to find solutions.
* Fluency in English at professional level.


**What We Offer**
**People** 
 come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model** 
 – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 27/04/2026. We will continuously invite relevant candidates for interviews.
   

  

**The recruitment process consists of the following steps:**
* Preliminary CV selection
* Phone conversation with the recruiter
* Online interviews with the hiring leader and other stakeholders
* Background check


**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships.** 
 We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change.** 
 We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea.** 
 We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Finland:** 
 A security clearance will be performed for the person selected for this position.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACONordea@nordea.com.

title: Territory Manager, Endoscopy (Visualization and Communication) - Northern Sweden
description:
**Visualization & Communication (Endoscopy)**
**Northern Sweden**
 At
 **Stryker** 
 , we are driven to make healthcare better.
   

  

 We are now looking for a commercially strong, structured and ambitious
   

  

 Territory Manager to take ownership of our Visualization & Communication portfolio in Northern / Southern Sweden. This is a high-impact role with full territory responsibility in a market that rewards resilience, strategic thinking and strong relationship-building.
   

  

**Visualization & Communication portfolio:** 
 Endoscopy | Stryker
   

  

**Your Mission**
 You will drive sales and market development of our Visualization & Communication portfolio across your territory. From operating theatres to procurement offices, from clinical workshops to contract negotiations you will own the full sales cycle.
   

  

**What You Will Be Responsible For**
* Taking full ownership of your territory and sales targets.
* Building and maintaining strong relationships with surgeons, theatre staff, hospital administration and procurement.
* Driving and managing complex tender processes (framework and volume-based agreements).
* Implementing marketing and sales strategies aligned with Nordic objectives.
* Conducting impactful product demonstrations in OR settings and clinical workshops.
* Advising and training surgical staff on product use.
* Preparing and managing orders, ensuring seamless follow-up and high customer satisfaction.
* Representing Stryker at congresses, trade fairs and professional meetings to expand your network and identify new business opportunities.


 You will start with an intensive onboarding and product training phase to ensure you are fully equipped to succeed.
   

  

**The Profile We Are Looking For**
 This role requires more than enthusiasm for the OR. It demands commercial maturity and structure.
   

  

 You bring:
   

  

* 4+ years of sales experience within medical devices, pharmaceutical or a comparable healthcare industry.
* Strong understanding of the Swedish healthcare landscape.
* Experience working in tender-driven environments (highly preferred).
* A University degree in medical technology, health management, business, science or a technical field.
* A passion for selling complex products and delivering high-level customer service.
* The ability to balance relationship-building with disciplined administrative execution.
* A valid driving license.
* Fluent Swedish and strong English skills (written and spoken).


 Endoscopy experience is an advantage, but a proven sales mindset in healthcare is more critical.
   

  

**What Makes This Role Unique**
* Full ownership of a strategically important territory.
* Opportunity to grow a market with strong future potential.
* Exposure to key opinion leaders and hospital decision-makers.
* A structured, world-class product portfolio with strong brand recognition.
* A competitive compensation package including base salary and commission.


 Stryker is a global leader in medical technologies and, together with its customers, is driven to make healthcare better. The company offers innovative products and services in MedSurg, Neurotechnology, Orthopaedics and Spine that help improve patient and healthcare outcomes. Alongside its customers around the world, Stryker impacts more than 150 million patients annually.

title: Senior Product Designer - Flights (Bangkok - Based, Relocation Provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know Our Design Team:**
 The Design team is a diverse group of product designers and researchers that help to build Agoda’s products from our home office in Bangkok. Being a product-driven company, we constantly partner with product managers and engineers to understand user problems and design workflows, interactions, and visual interfaces.
   

  

 There is always an opportunity for growth here. Focus on your craft to improve or expand your skill set, or step into a managerial role and flex your talents as a designer and driver of team projects. This is a great time to join a team that’s small enough to be scrappy and hands on, yet big enough to influence change and product strategy.
   

  

 At Agoda, we offer a range of travel products – including accommodations, flights, and activities – and are building the next generation of travel experiences to help customers plan and book their entire trip. We’re looking for a
 **Senior Product Designer, Flights** 
 to help transform the way users search for, book, and manage flights.
   

  

 As a
 **Senior Product Designer, Flights** 
 , you’ll focus on end-to-end user journeys, leading the design of intuitive and engaging experiences that make every step from enabling users to discover, search, book and manage their flights seamlessly on Agoda. In this role, you’ll drive design strategy, collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, and ensure our flight products set the benchmark for usability and innovation in the online travel industry.
   

  

 In your day-to-day work, you’ll turn strategy into actionable design solutions by setting design direction, solving complex challenges, and delivering experiences that are intuitive, scalable, and grounded in user insights. You’ll champion user needs throughout the product lifecycle, using research and data to continuously refine our flight offerings.
   

  

**Experience Requirements & Role Expectations:**
* 6+ years of full-time experience as a product designer for digital or web-based products; in-house experience highly preferred.
* Create visually stunning, intuitive, and delightful interfaces, and independently deliver pixel-perfect UI and seamless interactions. You sweat the details and care deeply about craft.
* You are highly experienced in UI design, with deep knowledge of design patterns and a creative approach to solving problems through user interfaces.
* Proficient in both quantitative and qualitative research, with hands-on experience running user interviews, synthesizing findings, and generating actionable insights to inform design decisions.
* Take full ownership of the design process for a dedicated scrum, from discovery to delivery. You’ll set the design vision, define the user experience, and ensure high-quality execution.
* Partner with Product managers to shape product vision and roadmap. You’ll use data, research, and business context to inform your design decisions, always balancing user needs with business goals.
* Has experience of managing multiple stakeholders within an agile development process
* Strong communicator who can articulate design rationale, influence stakeholders, and build trust across disciplines.
* A strong portfolio of work that demonstrates your design thinking, process, and solutions showcasing beautiful, user-centered web and mobile product design.


**Day to day, it looks like:**
* Develop design solutions that address both business objectives and customer needs
* Manage and communicate with stakeholders to ensure alignment and on-time delivery of features
* Test prototypes and hypotheses with users to gather actionable feedback
* Present your work to peers and leadership, both asynchronously and in person
* Participate in weekly design critiques, workshops, all-hands, and team meetings
* Document your design process and clearly articulate your decisions
* Champion cohesion and consistency in UX design across our expanding suite of products and features
* Bring a strategic vision to implementing experiences that balance customer needs with business, content, and technology


**Senior Product Designer at Agoda means you have a track record of:**
* You work alongside your design partners in driving discovery and ideation workshops and align the group around a vision and approach
* You have a track record of crafting sophisticated flows and customer journeys
* You can think and craft at a system level, not just interface elements or pages
* You’ll regularly make use of your soft skills: listening, negotiating, decision-making
* You can balance multiple priorities and successfully deliver in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.


**Qualities we value in designers:**
* Effective articulation of ideas and design solutions
* Demonstrates initiative and proactively communicates
* Expressing feedback with kindness and candor
* Tolerance for ambiguity and healthy curiosity
* Translation of quantitative & qualitative insights into design decisions
* Contribution to our culture: motivation, optimism, quality, integrity


 #seattle #sanfrancisco #beijing #newyork #london #bangkok #singapore #chicago #hongkong #singapore #berlin #shanghai #losangeles #boston #austin #toronto #luxembourg #munich #oslo #copenhagen #stockholm #helsinki #brussels #hamburg #stuttgart #taipei #hamburg #stuttgart #dublin #telaviv #sydney #melbourne #perth #vancouver #montreal #prague #paris #dublin #telaviv #milan #rome #amsterdam #moscow #saintpetersburg #frankfurt #shenzhen #istanbul #dubai #kiev #seoul
   

  

 Please review our Hiring Process Guidelines before your interview — click here to learn how interviewing at Agoda works.
   

  

**Discover More About Working At Agoda**
* Agoda Careers https://careersatagoda.com
* Facebook https://www.facebook.com/agodacareers/
* LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/agoda
* YouTube https://www.youtube.com/agodalife


**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.
   

  

**Disclaimer**
 We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Legal Engineer - Tax & Audit EMEA
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**What You’ll Be Doing**
 Let's get the tricky part out of the way: this role doesn't fit neatly into a traditional box. It's part legal ops, part product specialist, part solutions architect, and part client whisperer. If you enjoy roles that stay static, this probably isn't it. Your mission is to help our clients, some of the most sophisticated tax and legal advisory teams in the world, get the absolute most out of our platform.
   

  

**Some Of What You'll Be Up To**
* Acting as a thought partner to tax partners, legal advisory leaders, and consulting teams - building trusted relationships, addressing tricky pain points, and identifying high-value opportunities for them to scale their use of Legora across service lines and jurisdictions.
* Working together with Go To Market and Customer Success in taking full ownership of client relationships - from running pilots with key practice areas, to onboarding new team members across tax, legal and consulting functions, and ultimately guiding firm-wide adoption across Big 4 and professional services firms.
* Be the voice of tax and legal advisory users inside Legora - sharing insights from tax structuring teams, regulatory advisory practices, and legal consulting functions that directly inform product development, roadmap priorities, and strategic direction.
* Delivering clear, confident product demos and training that bring the power of our platform to life - whether you're presenting to a tax partner, rolling out to a global advisory team, or training legal consulting professionals.
* Documenting best practices from leading professional services firms, contribute to the development of scalable playbooks, and help shape how we grow this function globally.
* Confidently helping tax and legal advisory teams navigate one of the biggest shifts in how professional services operate - from evaluating the ROI and competitive advantage of AI to clearly mapping how AI will impact different service lines, from tax compliance to regulatory advisory.


**What You Bring**
 You come from the world of tax and legal advisory; but you've never been content with how things have always been done. You may have trained at a Big 4 firm, working across tax structuring, legal advisory, or consulting. Perhaps you've specialised in legal operations, innovation, or technology implementation within a professional services environment. Maybe you've even moved into legal tech or consultancy, helping advisory teams modernise and scale. Either way, you know how tax and legal advisory teams think, work, and (sometimes) struggle and you're ready to help them level up with technology.
   

  

**You'll Thrive In This Role If You**
* Have a background in law or tax, with experience at a Big 4 firm or leading professional services practice - ideally with exposure to multiple service lines, jurisdictions, or innovation initiatives.
* Are tech-curious and product-savvy. Not necessarily a coder, but passionate about navigating technical conversations, especially around things like generative AI, technology implementation, innovation and productivity.
* Communicate clearly and confidently with diverse stakeholders, from tax partners to consulting leaders, and from lawyers to engineers. I.e. translating across disciplines is second nature to you.
* Bring structure to ambiguity and energy to complexity; and enjoy being the calm, credible presence in a fast-moving environment.
* Understand how to evaluate and improve existing processes as a direct result of new and emerging technologies - whether that's streamlining tax compliance workflows, enhancing regulatory analysis, or improving multi-jurisdictional advisory work.
* Are proactive, self-directed, and comfortable juggling multiple client relationships at once.
* Care deeply about quality, but don't get stuck in perfectionism - you get things done, and you make them better over time.
* Understand the commercial realities of professional services: leveraging teams efficiently, demonstrating value to clients, managing complex multi-jurisdictional matters, and balancing technical excellence with commercial delivery.


**A few more things**
 We're a fast-growing company with bold ambitions, so you'll be joining at a time when things are moving quickly - in the best possible way. You'll have a lot of autonomy, a lot of responsibility, and the chance to genuinely shape how this function evolves. Everyone here has a founder-mentality.
   

  

 If that sounds exciting rather than terrifying, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Handläggare till Enheten för styrning och internationellt ekonomiskt samarbete, Finansdepartementet
description:
Enheten för styrning och internationellt ekonomiskt samarbete ansvarar bland annat för Sveriges relationer med, och styrning av, internationella finansiella institutioner som Internationella valutafonden, Världsbanken, Europeiska investeringsbanken, Europeiska banken för återuppbyggnad och utveckling, Nordiska investeringsbanken, Europarådets utvecklingsbank och Asiatiska infrastrukturinvesteringsbanken. Enheten arbetar bland annat även med utvecklingsländers skuldsättning och finansiellt stöd till Ukraina, samt ansvarar för myndighetsstyrning av Statskontoret, Finanspolitiska rådet och Konjunkturinstitutet. Enheten består för närvarande av cirka 15 medarbetare.
   

  

****Din arbetsdag. Sveriges morgondag.****
 Vi söker nu en handläggare till verksamhetens internationella del. Arbetet innefattar ekonomisk policyanalys av aktuella frågor i de internationella institutionerna, samt förberedelser inför och i vissa fall deltagande i institutionernas styrelsemöten.
