title: Product Design Director
description:
We believe it takes great people to create a great product. That’s why our team lives our company values, and we hire based on them, too. Since 2010, Pipedrive has been on a mission to support sales and marketing teams with easy-to-use, powerful tools that make everyday work faster and easier. Today, our cloud-based software is trusted by over 100,000 companies and used in 179 countries. We have grown from a five-person team to a truly international company of over 850+ people, representing more than 50 nationalities, with ten offices distributed across Europe and the US. In 2020, Pipedrive received a majority investment from Vista Equity Partners, a global investment firm that invests exclusively in enterprise software, data and technology-enabled businesses, making Pipedrive the fifth unicorn from Estonia.  

As a Product Design Director at Pipedrive, you will provide strategic, hands-on leadership to ensure design initiatives drive meaningful business outcomes and create exceptional, intelligent user experiences. You will operate at the intersection of AI-native product innovation, design craft, and executional excellence, partnering closely with Product, Engineering, Marketing, and Data to shape the future of how customers experience Pipedrive. If you have a proven record of shipping 0-1 products, bring strong product intuition, deep design expertise, and a forward-looking perspective on how AI augments workflows, decision-making, and user value, we’d love to hear from you!

### **Your new adventure:**

* Develop and execute a cohesive 0-1 product and design strategy aligned with Pipedrive’s vision, business goals, and an AI-native product direction where intelligence is intrinsic to core workflows
* Ensure design initiatives deliver measurable impact on growth, retention, monetization, and customer satisfaction across AI-native and core product experiences
* Partner closely with Product, Engineering, Marketing and Data teams to define how AI models, data, and automation surface value through clear, usable, and trusted experiences
* Champion user research, rapid experimentation, and continuous feedback loops to validate AI behaviors, system confidence, and user trust
* Balance short-term delivery with long-term vision, ensuring AI-driven experiences scale responsibly as products, data, and teams evolve
* Provide clear, inspiring leadership, mentoring designers and design managers to grow their craft, product judgment, and fluency in designing AI-native experiences
* Lead and grow a team of 4-5 product designers, building a culture of craft, clarity, and customer obsession
* Foster a design-led, AI-native mindset across the organization, shaping how teams think about intelligence, automation, and user value

### **Does this sound like you?**

* 12+ years of experience in product design
* 5+ years of experience leading and managing design teams, with a focus on mentorship, performance, and culture-building
* A proven track record of shipping zero-to-one products, leading new ideas from concept through to product-market fit
* Deep understanding of how AI-driven capabilities can enhance workflows and create real user value
* Demonstrated success in aligning design strategies with business goals and driving measurable outcomes
* Strong portfolio showcasing a user-centric, data-informed approach, as well as the ability to influence and align stakeholders
* Excellent communication, collaboration, and leadership skills, with a commitment to continuous learning
* Experience balancing vision and execution, turning ambitious ideas into shipped, impactful product experiences
* Comfortable operating in high-intensity, startup-like environments while structuring teams to deliver efficiently
* Ability to mentor and grow designers, building a culture of craft, curiosity, and customer obsession
* Strong product sense, with the ability to translate user insights into actionable, business-relevant design solutions

### **Why Pipedrive?**

* **People-first culture** - Be part of a team that values authenticity, champions collaboration, and supports each other—no egos, just teamwork. Work alongside top talent from around the world in an inclusive space where different perspectives fuel our best ideas. Everyone is welcome
* **Unlock potential** – Push boundaries, take ownership, and experiment with the latest technologies as we enhance our AI First Vision. We empower bold ideas that drive real change
* **We’ve got you** – Your well-being matters. Enjoy flexible hours, wellness perks and SWAG. Think performance-based bonuses, 28 paid leave days, well-being days, compassionate leave, and even paternal leave—because we take care of ourselves and our people
* **Grow with us** – Whether through mentorship, coaching, or internal mobility, we invest in helping you unlock your potential. Open, honest feedback and clear communication are at our core. We grow together through trust and accountability
* **Packed with purpose** – Help 100,000+ small and medium-sized businesses grow and succeed while doing meaningful, customer-driven work


Based on this role's access to certain data, Pipedrive might conduct a pre-employment background investigation in conjunction with your application for employment with our company. Such data will be handled in accordance with Pipedrive's Privacy Policy for Recruitment.

Pipedrive is an equal opportunity employer. We encourage diversity in the workplace regardless of age, gender, race, religion, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity or veteran status.

#LI-Hybrid
#LI-KA2

We’re looking for a product design leader with a proven track record of building products from 0 -1, someone who can lead teams, shape product strategy, and craft AI-powered experiences that drive real-world impact.  

If this is something for you, send us your resume (in English) or a link to your LinkedIn profile and please add why we should pay extra attention to your application.  

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to transcribe and summarize interviews. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Junior Platform Engineer
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You enjoy making systems work, not just writing code, but understanding how everything fits together underneath. You’ve probably spent time tinkering on your own, setting up servers, hosting things yourself, or trying to understand how infrastructure actually behaves in the real world.
   

  

 At Tandem, you’ll join a small, highly skilled platform team and help build the infrastructure that powers the future of European healthcare. You don’t need to know everything from day one - what matters most is your drive to learn, your curiosity, and your willingness to get your hands dirty.
   

  

 This role is focused on infrastructure first. You’ll work closely with experienced engineers, gradually taking ownership of parts of our platform and helping the team move faster by offloading and improving core infrastructure work. Along the way, you’ll learn how to build systems that are reliable, secure, and scalable in a highly regulated environment.
   

  

 If you’re someone who enjoys figuring things out, breaking and fixing systems, and continuously improving how things run - this is a great place to grow.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Support the team in building and maintaining cloud infrastructure that powers Tandem’s products.
* Work with Kubernetes-based systems and help improve how services are deployed and operated.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, making deployments smoother and more reliable.
* Assist in implementing infrastructure-as-code using tools like Terraform and Helm.
* Help improve observability, monitoring, and alerting across our systems.
* Take ownership of smaller infrastructure components over time and help scale them.
* Work closely with senior engineers to learn best practices around reliability, security, and performance.


**What You Bring**
* Some experience working with cloud infrastructure (Azure, AWS, or GCP).
* Familiarity with Kubernetes, CI/CD, or infrastructure tooling - even if not at an expert level.
* Exposure to infrastructure-as-code tools like Terraform or Helm.
* Basic programming skills - enough to script, automate, and understand systems.
* A strong curiosity for how systems work under the hood.
* A mindset of learning and improvement - you’re eager to develop your skills quickly.
* Interest in building reliable systems that help others move faster.


**Bonus Points**
* You’ve built or run your own infrastructure projects (e.g. self-hosting, home labs, media servers, etc.)
* Experience working with slightly larger systems or production environments
* Familiarity with networking, security, or observability concepts
* Experience with Kubernetes packaging (e.g. Helm charts)
* Background in software engineering or scripting-heavy roles


 Location
   

  

 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 Our interview process consists of 4 stages:
   

  

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch, a presentation and som pair programming to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 25 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 We are seeking a Site Reliability Engineer to Visa Open Banking - delivering open banking solutions as a part of Visa.
   

  

 Perhaps the most dramatic outcome of the digital revolution is the amount of data that is now collected and analysed. Visa Open Banking handles billions of events, and this number is increasing at an exponential rate. We are passionate about enabling data-driven decisions for our clients and internal stakeholders. Our goal is to ensure data is collected, transformed, and presented securely with accuracy and reliability. Building the infrastructure and services to support this is hence a key part of what VOB engineers are doing.
   

  

 We are looking for a Site Reliability Engineer to join our Edge Infrastructure team. You will be part of the team responsible for maintaning and improving VOB system reliability, scalability and efficiency. Your primary focus will be on maintaining and improving out traffic management platform, creating a safe environment for teams to publish their services.
   

  

**What We Offer You**
 A position in the Edge team means working in an international environment where you will be involved in:
   

  

* Providing VOB engineers with tailored self-service tools and services that enable teams to deliver, operate and observe their services, with low friction.
* Focusing on automation and tooling to enable other engineering teams to focus on core business activities.
* Automate provisioning, monitoring, and scaling using scripting (Python, Go, Bash).
* Collaborating with stakeholders to ensure that the services and tools align with their evolving requirements and use cases.
* Being a best practice champion, influence and create new designs, architectures, standards and methods for large-scale systems.


 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Rapid Engineer – AI Engineer
description:
**Rapid Engineer – AI Engineer** 




**Location:** 
 Stockholm
 



  





**About Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)** 




  





 With more than 600,000 employees globally, we work with leading companies across industries helping them achieve their business goals and lead their digital transformation. TCS ranks amongst global top 3 technology consulting companies across multiple parameters: revenues, employees, market valuation and brand value.
 



 In Sweden we work with more than 50 companies who are leaders in their own space. With them we have long term and trustful relationships. TCS in Sweden and Nordics has been ranked as a Top Employer for 12 consecutive years that reflects the organization’s commitment to an inclusive, empowered and entrepreneurial work culture.
 



  





**About the Role**




  





 Do you want to turn AI ideas into working, scalable solutions?
 



 We are looking for an AI Engineer who enjoys building, testing, and deploying intelligent systems in fast‑moving environments. In this role, you will work hands‑on with data, models, and platforms to deliver AI solutions that are production‑ready and demonstrable working closely with architects, customers, and rapid engineering teams.
 



 If you are passionate about engineering AI systems that actually work in real‑world settings, we invite you to join us.
 



  





**Your Role & Impact**




  





 Are you an engineer who thrives on turning concepts into working AI solutions? Do you enjoy rapid experimentation, customer‑facing demos, and collaborating with architects and partners?
 



 As an AI / ML Engineer, you will focus on the engineering and implementation of AI/ML solutions. You will help design and build end‑to‑end AI components, develop models and pipelines, and bring architectures to life through rapid demos and proofs of value. Your work will directly influence solution quality, performance, and delivery speed.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities**




  





 In this role, you will:
 


* Build and implement end‑to‑end AI/ML solutions, translating architectural designs into working systems
* Develop, train, and deploy machine learning and generative AI models for real‑world use cases
* Support and participate in customer presentations and demos, explaining technical choices and outcomes
* Explore and apply new AI/ML solution paradigms from the market, including emerging tools and frameworks
* Collaborate with strategic partners to integrate platforms, APIs, and services into AI solutions
* Drive rapid demos and proofs of value together with the Rapid Engineering team.
* Contribute to improving engineering practices, code quality, and reproducibility of AI solutions



  





**What Makes You the Ideal Candidate**




  





 You combine solid software engineering skills with hands‑on experience in AI/ML. You enjoy learning new technologies and are comfortable working in environments where speed, quality, and collaboration matter.
 



 In addition, you bring:
 


* Experience building and deploying AI/ML solutions in practical environments
* Strong understanding of machine learning concepts, data pipelines, and model lifecycle
* Hands‑on programming skills and the ability to work with modern AI frameworks including Vibe Coding tools.
* Clear communication skills and the ability to collaborate with architects, engineers, and customers
* A proactive mindset with a focus on learning and continuous improvement
* Technology Stack:
 
 You do not need experience with all technologies listed below. A broad understanding of below technologies with deeper expertise in few areas will be ideal.
* Programming & Frameworks: Python, ML libraries, deep learning frameworks
* AI / ML Platforms: Managed ML services, generative AI platforms, open‑source model ecosystems
* Data & Pipelines: Feature engineering tools, data processing frameworks, batch and streaming pipelines
* MLOps: Model training, versioning, deployment, monitoring, and experimentation tooling
* RAG & Agentic Components: Vector databases, embeddings, orchestration frameworks
* Cloud & Runtime: Cloud‑native deployments, containers, scalable inference services
* DevOps & Engineering: CI/CD pipelines, source control, automated testing
* Vibe Coding Platforms and Tools. E.g. Google AI Studio, Anti Gravity, etc.



  





**What We Offer**




  





 We offer you the opportunity to join an environment where excellence in AI engineering and continual innovation are valued and encouraged. You'll be part of small, specialized teams dedicated to pushing the boundaries of advanced AI technologies and solutions.
 



 As a member of our team, you will have the autonomy and support to establish yourself as a technical authority in AI.
 



 You will work with stateoftheart AI technologies and frameworks, gaining handson experience with the latest tools and methodologies in the field.
 



 We provide competitive compensation and highly attractive employment conditions designed to recognize your contributions and support your professional growth.
 



 You will enjoy flexible work arrangements, including the possibility to work from Stockholm or Amsterdam, and be part of a vibrant, international team that values diverse perspectives.
 



  





**Ready to Build and Ship AI?**




  





 If you are motivated to engineer AI solutions, experiment rapidly, and see your work used in real environments, we invite you to apply and grow with us.
 



  





**Privacy Note:** 




**https://ibegin.tcs.com/iBegin/privacy-notice**

title: Account Executive
description:
**Account Executive – LeadDesk** 




  





 LeadDesk är en etablerad SaaS-plattform för högvolymförsäljning och kundservice med stark position i Norden och en tydlig tillväxtagenda. Vi söker en Account Executive som har gjort det här tillräckligt länge för att veta skillnaden mellan en pipeline och en önskelista – och som fortfarande väljer att lyfta luren när det är enklast att inte göra det.
 



  





**Rollen** 




 Du ansvarar för hela säljcykeln. Från prospektering till signerat avtal. Du arbetar med beslutsfattare, hanterar komplexa köpprocesser och förväntas bygga en pipeline du kan stå för i varje forecast-möte.
 



 Det finns inget krångligare sätt att beskriva det än så.
 



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Du har minst två år av bevisad B2B-försäljning bakom dig och vet hur man kvalificerar hårt utan att tappa relationen. Du har känt trycket av ett kvartal som inte ser ut som det borde – och levererat ändå.
 



 Erfarenhet från SaaS, contact center eller telekom är meriterande. Flytande svenska är ett krav. Engelska ett plus.
 



 Det vi egentligen söker är någon som inte behöver bli motiverad utifrån. Det är antingen inbyggt eller så är det inte det.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 En grundlön som speglar erfarenhet. Provision utan tak och en ledning som respekterar att du vet hur du säljer. Produkten är konkurrenskraftig och marknaden är redo.
 



 Resten är upp till dig.
 



  





**Ansökan** 




 Ladda ned Graftus appen och matcha med jobbet där!

title: Data Engineer - Databricks to Knowit Stockholm
description:
**Build modern data platforms with Databricks at the center**
 Do you want to work hands-on with Databricks and deepen your expertise in data engineering? At Knowit, we are looking for a Databricks Specialist / Data Engineer who wants to help build scalable, modern data solutions with Databricks and Python as a central part of the solution.
   

  

**About The Role As a Databricks Specialist At Knowit**
 In this role at Knowit in Stockholm, you will help our clients design, build, and orchestrate modern cloud-based data platforms. Databricks will be a key part of these solutions, and you will have the opportunity to explore new features, approaches, and best practices within the platform.
   

  

 You will join a strong competence network within Cloud, Data, and AI, where collaboration, knowledge sharing, and ongoing technical development are part of everyday work. As a Databricks partner, we work closely with the platform and stay up to date with new capabilities.
   

  

**Your main responsibilities will include:**
* Designing and developing scalable data platforms based on Databricks and Lakehouse architecture
* Building, optimizing, and orchestrating data pipelines using Python and PySpark
* Working with data governance and management through Unity Catalog
* Integrating data with BI, AI, and ML solutions to create real business value
* Supporting clients in establishing secure, robust, and future-proof data engineering solutions


**Our tech stack / tools and ways of working**
* Data platform: Databricks
* Programming: Python, PySpark
* Cloud platforms: Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud
* Data architecture: Lakehouse, modern data platforms
* AI & Analytics: integrations with BI, AI, and machine learning


 We believe in flexibility and continuous learning. You are not expected to know everything from day one your willingness to grow is just as important as your current technical skills.
   

  

**Who are we looking for?**
 We are looking for someone with a solid foundation in data engineering and several years of experience working as a Data Engineer in modern data environments. You have a genuine interest in Databricks and want to continue deepening your expertise within the platform and its ecosystem.
   

  

 As a person, you are curious, solution-oriented, and enjoy tackling complex technical challenges. You have strong skills in Python and PySpark and are comfortable working with cloud-based data platforms. Experience with data governance and orchestration, for example using Unity Catalog, is a plus.
   

  

 Previous experience in a consulting role is also considered an advantage, as well as an interest in or experience with AI and machine learning. You enjoy collaboration, knowledge sharing, and working closely with both colleagues and clients to create solutions that deliver real business value.

title: Solution Consultant - Firefly Enterprise Solutions (Stockholm)
description:
**This Role Is For You If…**
 You are equal parts creative visionary, storyteller, technical expert, and trusted advisor. You get excited about turning complex GenAI capabilities into compelling stories and working solutions that make enterprise customers lean forward. You don't just run demos, you are a thought leader leaning in to every single customer’s context. You understand how large organizations create content, where the friction lives, and exactly how generative and agentic AI removes it. You use AI tools in your own work every day, and you're ready to help the world's most iconic brands see - concretely and credibly - what the GenAI era makes possible for them.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 Adobe's Firefly Enterprise Solutions are redefining how enterprises think about AI-enabled content creation at scale - rooted in brand integrity, commercial safety and governance, and purpose-built to fit enterprise needs.
   

  

 As a Senior Solution Consultant on the Firefly Enterprise Solutions team in EMEA, you will be the creative and technical heart of our pre-sales motion - the person who bridges customer challenges and Adobe's GenAI capabilities with clarity, craft, and conviction. You’re part of a team of ambitious forward-thinkers, and you'll work with practitioners, creative leaders, and executive decision-makers at Europe's most iconic enterprises, translating vision into working solutions that move deals forward and set customers up for transformative outcomes.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
**Customer-Centric Solution Consulting**
* Lead customer workshops, workflow assessments, and discovery sessions to surface critical business challenges and identify high-impact opportunities for GenAI-powered transformation across content production and marketing workflows
* Develop and deliver compelling, value-based product demonstrations and Proof of Concepts that bring Adobe Firefly Enterprise capabilities to life - tailored to each customer's objectives, workflows, and stakeholder audience
* Translate customer needs into concrete Adobe solutions involving Firefly Enterprise Solutions, Creative Cloud, AEM, Workfront, GenStudio, APIs, and creative automation - articulating the value of complex technical concepts clearly to audiences from practitioners to C-level
* Support architecture design discussions and solution specifications in close partnership with Solution Architects, ensuring a coherent technical narrative and a seamless handover into implementation


**Scalable Impact & Advocacy**
* Collaborate across sales, product teams, and forward deployed engineering to set the strategy and vision for GenAI opportunities, acting as the voice of the customer back into Adobe
* Partner with Value Consultants and Solution Architects to ensure every engagement tells a consistent, end-to-end story from business case through to technical solution fit
* Champion the use of AI in your own consulting practice - using generative AI tools to build better demos, prepare faster, and engage customers with greater depth and creativity


**Market Intelligence & Strategic Alignment**
* Stay at the leading edge of content production trends, Martech/Adtech ecosystems, and the evolving AI landscape, synthesizing insights that strengthen Adobe's positioning in EMEA markets
* Provide structured feedback from the field to the product ecosystem to ensure Adobe's roadmap and messaging reflect the realities of enterprise creative workflows
* Represent Adobe as a thought leader at industry events, conferences, and customer engagements that elevate Adobe's voice and credibility in the EMEA market


**What You'll Need To Succeed**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in a relevant field, or demonstrable equivalent experience in technical presales, solutions consulting, or the field of creative & marketing content
* 5+ years of experience in a technical pre-sales or solution selling environment, with a proven track record of success across complex, multi-stakeholder enterprise deals
* Deep understanding of marketing and content production workflows in large enterprises, familiarity with Adobe Firefly Enterprise Solutions, GenStudio, or comparable GenAI platforms being a strong advantage
* Experience with solutions involving generative AI, APIs, and automation technologies
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear, compelling value narratives for non-technical audiences up to C-level, using design thinking and customer-centric methodologies to surface areas of impact
* Both hands-on experience with AI tools and genuine curiosity about the implications of GenAI for enterprise content operations and brand workflows at scale
* Comfortable operating with ambiguity and pace in a fast-evolving environment, with the mindset of an enabler who raises the capability of the teams and customers around them
* Fluent in Swedish and English, preferably fluent in 1 more European language


 As our many awards will tell you, at Adobe you’ll be immersed in an exceptional work environment that is recognized around the world. You’ll be surrounded by colleagues who are committed to helping each other grow through our unique Check-In approach where ongoing feedback flows freely. If you’re looking to make an impact, Adobe's the place for you. Discover what our employees are saying about their career experiences on the Adobe Life blog, https://blog.adobe.com/en/topics/adobe-life and explore the fantastic benefits we offer at Rewards.adobe.com.
   

  

 Adobe is an equal opportunity employer. We hire talented individuals, regardless of gender, race or colour, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or veteran status. We know that when our employees feel appreciated and included, they can be more creative, innovative and successful. This is what it means to be Adobe For All.
   

  

 We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**About Adobe**
 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalized customer experiences. Adobe’s industry-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.
   

  

 Our 30,000+ employees worldwide are creating the future and raising the bar as we drive the next decade of growth. We’re on a mission to hire the very best and believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. At Adobe, we believe that great ideas can come from anywhere in the organization. The next big idea could be yours.
   

  

**Let’s Adobe together**
 At Adobe, we believe in creating a company culture where all employees are empowered to make an impact. Learn more about Adobe life, including our values and culture, focus on people, purpose and community, Adobe for All, comprehensive benefits programs, the stories we tell, the customers we serve, and how you can help us advance our mission of empowering everyone to create.
   

  

 Adobe is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on gender, race or color, ethnicity or national origin, age, disability, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Learn more.
   

  

 Adobe aims to make our Careers website and recruiting process accessible to any and all users. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation to navigate our website or complete the application process, email accommodations@adobe.com or call +1 408-536-3015.
   

  

**AI Use Guidelines for Interviews:**
 Our interviews are designed to reflect your own skills and thinking. The use of AI or recording tools during live interviews is not permitted unless explicitly invited by the interviewer or approved in advance as part of a reasonable accommodation. If these tools are used inappropriately or in a way that misrepresents your work, your application may not move forward in the process.
   

  

 At Adobe, we empower employees to innovate with AI — and we look for candidates eager to do the same. As part of the hiring experience, we provide clear guidance on where AI is encouraged during the process and where it’s restricted during live interviews. See how we think about AI in the hiring experience.

title: Machine Learning engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **Machine Learning Engineer** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Machine Learning Engineer at Viaplay, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the next generation of our data-driven products and services. Working at the intersection of personalization, customer engagement, and operational intelligence, you’ll design and deploy state-of-the-art ML systems that directly impact millions of users across our platform.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will extend far beyond model development. You’ll act as a strategic partner to product, engineering, and commercial teams, translating business objectives into scalable, high-impact ML solutions. Whether enhancing our recommendation engines, uncovering deep user insights, or enabling smarter decision-making across the organization, your work will be central to Viaplay’s continued growth and innovation.
   

  

 You’ll join a high-performing, inclusive, and curious team of ML Engineers, Data Scientists, Analysts, and Data Engineers. Together, we foster a culture of experimentation, shared ownership, and technical excellence. Our recommender system already powers engaging user experiences, and we’re only at the beginning of our machine learning journey.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning models for recommendation, prediction, and classification use cases.
* Own and lead end-to-end ML initiatives, from ideation and stakeholder alignment to development, deployment, and ongoing performance evaluation.
* Translate business needs into structured ML problems and deliver measurable, impactful outcomes.
* Build robust, production-ready pipelines and monitor ML systems in a cloud-native environment.
* Conduct advanced statistical analyses to uncover trends in user behavior, content performance, and platform engagement.
* Collaborate closely with product, engineering, content, commercial, and marketing teams to drive data-informed decision-making.
* Contribute to a culture of experimentation, innovation, and continuous learning within the data team.


**What We’re Looking For**
 We're seeking someone who combines technical depth with strategic thinking and a curious, problem-solving mindset.
   

  

 We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:
   

  

* Proven experience leading ML projects end-to-end, from problem definition and stakeholder alignment to deployment and monitoring in production.
* Expertise in one or more ML domains such as LLMs, NLP, recommendation systems, or reinforcement learning.
* Ability to build ML solutions that are scalable, robust, and explainable, not just performant in isolation.
* Strong experience deploying ML models in cloud environments (preferably AWS) and using containerization tools like Docker .
* Familiarity with orchestration tools such as Airflow for reliable ML pipeline execution and monitoring
* Solid software engineering fundamentals.
* 5+ years of hands-on experience in applied Machine Learning within production environments.
* Strong academic background in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.


**It’s a bonus if you have:** 
  

  

* Experience with recommender systems, personalization, or content optimization — ideally in media, streaming, or e-commerce.
* Familiarity with MLOps practices, including CI/CD for ML, model monitoring, and production observability.
* Exposure to real-time or near-real-time ML architectures and streaming data systems.


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


**Hit play today**
 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Senior Penetration Tester
description:
*Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a Senior Penetration Tester to team up with the most dedicated team of cybersecurity specialists in our Offensive Security team.*
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 350 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for a Senior Penetration Tester who wants to make a difference in our Offensive Security Team.
   

  

 Offensive Security Team
   

  

 Truesec’s Offensive Security Team is a group of dedicated cybersecurity specialists working proactively to help organizations protect themselves against cyber breaches by identifying vulnerabilities before they are exploited. As part of this team, you’ll collaborate closely with some of the world’s top security experts, leveraging combined knowledge and experience to conduct penetration tests, security assessments, and advanced red and purple team engagements.
   

  

 The work is highly technical and focuses on uncovering security weaknesses in enterprise- and cloud environments, including mobile applications, cloud platforms, IOT/OT systems, and both Linux and Microsoft infrastructures. Team members lead assignments from start to finish, maintaining direct contact with customers and driving projects alongside colleagues, all with the shared mission of making a real difference in cybersecurity and contributing to a safer digital world
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 In this role, you will be part of the Offensive Security Team at Truesec, granting you the opportunity to work with some of the best security specialists in the world. As a Senior Penetration tester you will primarily conduct advanced security reviews and penetration tests as well as lead and drive the projects with a colleague. You will be leading the assignments from start to finish, meaning that you will be in close contact with our customers for initiation meetings and lead the entire testing-process, as well as leading other colleagues in your team within the projects.
   

  

 The assignments are performed on a technical level where you will actively look for security vulnerabilities, mostly in enterprise environments. Typical projects can be penetration testing of mobile applications, Linux and Microsoft environments, AWS, Google, and IOT/OT or advanced red and purple teaming assignments.
   

  

 To succeed in this role we believe that you are a true expert in a specific area or technology and repeatedly mastermind other implementations with the ambition to make a difference.
   

  

 Your Potential Background
   

  

 We all have various backgrounds, but what we have in common is our love and joy of IT security and hacking. If you share our passion, join us!
   

  

**Required Skills:**
 You should meet most of the following requirements, or be a true expert in a few.
   

  

* Experience in penetration testing of enterprise environments.
* Ability to identify vulnerabilities in both Windows and Linux systems.
* Experience in network-based penetration tests.
* Experience in credentials extraction and lateral movement.
* Ability to identify vulnerabilities on mobile applications.
* Experience in penetration testing of IOT/OT systems.
* Ability to identify vulnerabilities in cloud environments.
* Ability to present findings to a non-technical audience.


**Bonus Skills:**
* Sysadmin experience.
* Ability to understand arbitrary programming language.
* Full proficiency in at least one programming language.
* Experience of code assisted/code review-based penetration testing.
* Relevant security related certifications.


 As a senior penetration tester, we believe that you actively stay up to date with the latest technologies or maybe you are active in several forums or networks within offensive security. At Truesec we believe in creating awareness and we continuously attend events as guests or even key note speakers.
   

  

*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 At Truesec, you will help shape the future of offensive security while working with and learning from some of the industry’s best minds. You’ll have the freedom and responsibility to drive innovation, mentor the next generation of cybersecurity talent, and make a tangible impact for our clients and society at large. If you are ready to lead, inspire, and deliver at the highest level, we are excited to get to know you.

title: Rapid Engineer - Full Stack Developer
description:
***Rapid Engineer - Full Stack Developer***




**Location: Stockholm or Amsterdam** 




  





**About Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)** 




  





 With more than 600,000 employees globally, we work with leading companies across industries helping them achieve their business goals and lead their digital transformation. TCS ranks amongst global top 3 technology consulting companies across multiple parameters: revenues, employees, market valuation and brand value.
 



 In Sweden we work with more than 50 companies who are leaders in their own space. With them we have long term and trustful relationships. TCS in Sweden and Nordics has been ranked as a Top Employer for 12 consecutive years that reflects the organization’s commitment to an inclusive, empowered and entrepreneurial work culture.
 



  





**About the Role**




  





 Do you want to build modern, intelligent applications from front‑end to back‑end?
 



 We are looking for a Full Stack Developer who enjoys working across the entire technology stack building responsive user interfaces, scalable back‑end services, and integrations with AI capabilities. In this role, you will help bring innovative ideas to life through working applications, rapid demos, and production‑ready solutions.
 



 If you are passionate about creating end‑to‑end digital solutions and collaborating closely with architects, engineers, and customers, we invite you to join us.
 



  





**Your Role & Impact**




  





 Are you a developer who feels equally comfortable working on user interfaces, APIs, and service integrations? Do you enjoy rapid execution, experimenting with new solution paradigms, and demonstrating tangible outcomes?
 



 As a Full Stack Developer, you will focus on end‑to‑end application development, building solutions that connect modern front‑end experiences with robust back‑end services and AI integrations. You will play a key role in rapid demos and proofs of value, ensuring solutions are functional, scalable, and aligned with architectural guidance.

 In this role, you will:

 You combine strong full‑stack development skills with a collaborative mindset and an interest in modern, AI‑enabled applications. You are comfortable working in fast‑paced environments and enjoy learning new technologies.
 



 In addition, you bring:

* AI Service Integration: AI APIs, model services, intelligent back‑end integrations
* Cloud & Deployment: Cloud‑native application hosting, containers, scalable runtime environments
* DevOps & Engineering: CI/CD pipelines, source control, automated testing, Agile toolchains



  





**What We Offer**




  





 We offer you the opportunity to join an environment where excellence in AI engineering, architectural leadership, and continual innovation is valued and encouraged. You'll be part of small, specialized teams dedicated to pushing the boundaries of advanced AI technologies and solutions.
 



 As a member of our team, you will have the autonomy and support to establish yourself as a technical expert, taking ownership of impactful projects and initiatives.
 



 You will work with stateoftheart AI technologies and frameworks, gaining handson experience with the latest tools and methodologies in the field.
 



 We provide competitive compensation and highly attractive employment conditions designed to recognize your contributions and support your professional growth.
 



 You will enjoy flexible work arrangements, including the possibility to work from Stockholm or Amsterdam, and be part of a vibrant, international team that values diverse perspectives.
 



  





**Ready to Build End‑to‑End Digital Experiences?**




 If you are excited about developing full stack applications, integrating AI capabilities, and seeing your work come to life through demos and deployments, we invite you to apply and grow with us.
 



  





  





**Privacy Note:** 




**https://ibegin.tcs.com/iBegin/privacy-notice**

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**Join our highly skilled team of developers — breaking new ground and shaping the future of retail.** 




  





**We dare to dream big, we have the courage to keep raising the bar, and we’re committed to being a force for good in retail - helping both established and fast-growing brands meet the ever-changing expectations of their customers.** 




  





**Sitoo is a fast-growing technology company exploring how far we can take innovation to deliver the world’s best Unified Commerce Platform and Point of Sale. Our technology is used in more than 20 countries - a number that keeps growing thanks to our incredible team of engineers. And we have no intention of slowing down. Are you the Senior Data Engineer we’re looking for?** 




  





**Your mission at Sitoo** 




  





 As a Senior Data Engineer at Sitoo, you will be a foundational member of the Data & Analytics team, responsible for building and evolving our data platform and infrastructure that power business insights, analytics, and data products across the company.
 



  





 This is a hands-on, high-impact role where you will shape our data platform from the ground up making data reliable, accessible, and trusted. If you enjoy ownership, pragmatic architecture, and seeing your work directly influence how a company operates and grows, this role is for you.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 




  




* Build and develop a scalable and modern data platform in a cloud environment, ensuring our platform reliably supports growing data demands across the company and our product.
* Design and develop robust and efficient data pipelines and frameworks that streamline how data is ingested, processed, and made available, delivering timely, accurate data to power insights, analytics, and data products.
* Work closely with product, engineering, and business teams to understand real needs and translate them into data solutions, including partnering with Engineering on event tracking, schemas, and performance.
* Own the reliability and quality of the data platform, including orchestration, CI/CD, testing, monitoring, alerting, and pragmatic data contracts
* Implement security, privacy, and governance standards, including access control and responsible handling of sensitive data (PII).



  





**What you'll bring to the table** 




  




* ~5 years of experience as a Data Engineer or similar role.
* Proven track record of hands-on building and evolving a modern data platform in a cloud environment and designing and operating scalable, reliable data pipelines end-to-end.
* Hands-on experience working with cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, Databricks, or similar)
* Strong programming skills in SQL, Python or similar language (eg. Scala or Java)
* Strong working knowledge of orchestration tools (Airflow, Dagster, Prefect, or similar)
* Experience with version control and CI/CD practices for data, including secure development workflows and responsible handling of sensitive data (PII).
* Proven ability in implementing data quality and testing practices, such as automated tests, monitoring, and validation.



  





**Why Sitoo** 




 We are forward thinkers. By turning curiosity into knowledge — and knowledge into continuous improvement — we break new ground and shape the future of retail.
 



  





 We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels like they belong. We support each other, win together, celebrate success together, and overcome challenges together.
 



  





 Today, we are close to 100 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.

title: Senior Backend Engineer | Routing Team
description:
**About The Team**
 The Routing Team is the engineering core of Instabee, tasked with solving one of logistics' greatest challenges: the "Traveling Salesman Problem" at scale. We build the systems that plan and optimize thousands of last-mile delivery routes in real time. As a Senior Backend Engineer, you’ll join a high-impact squad of three backend developers, a frontend specialist, and a Staff Engineer. This is a role for an engineer who wants to see their code have an immediate, measurable impact on global distribution costs and delivery accuracy.
   

  

 Technical Environment
   

  

 Our ecosystem is built for high-concurrency and reliability. While we are primarily a Golang shop, we value engineers who can navigate polyglot environments and lead the modernization of existing systems.
   

  

* 🐹 Languages: Golang, (Primary), with legacy components in Java and Node.js.
* 🗄️ Data & Storage: PostgreSQL, MongoDB.
* ☁️ Infrastructure: GCP, Kubernetes (Helm), Terraform.
* 🔁 CI/CD & Observability: GitHub Actions, Grafana.


 Core Responsibilities
   

  

 You will take full ownership of the backend lifecycle, from initial design and requirement gathering to production delivery. A key part of your mission will be evolving our legacy services into modern, high-performance architectures that ensure long-term scalability. We expect you to write clean, maintainable code that sets the standard for the rest of the engineering organization.
   

  

 Beyond the IDE, you will foster a strong engineering culture through technical mentorship and rigorous code reviews. You’ll act as a strategic partner to Product Managers, refining technical solutions that move the needle on our key KPIs. You will also play a critical role in system resilience, leading incident management and root-cause analysis to ensure our production environment remains world-class.
   

  

**About You**
 We are looking for a seasoned backend engineer with deep expertise in Golang and a track record of scaling distributed systems in the cloud. You should have a sophisticated grasp of Kubernetes, Terraform, and SQL, and feel right at home within a Google Cloud environment.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is a pragmatic architect who knows how to balance technical debt with the speed of business delivery. You are a proactive communicator who is comfortable navigating ambiguity and making firm technical decisions. Above all, you are driven by the intersection of high-level software engineering and physical operations—you want your work to result in real-world efficiency.
   

  

 Culture and Professional Environment
   

  

 We believe the best systems are built by engineers who truly understand the user experience. That’s why we offer the unique opportunity to visit our terminals and join delivery drivers on their routes to see your logic in action. To support your craft, we provide paid licenses for advanced development tools and AI-assisted coding agents, alongside regular "Hack Days" to turn your best ideas into production-ready solutions.
   

  

 We operate with a hybrid work model that blends deep-focus remote work with collaborative office days. We’ve built an inclusive environment where professional growth is fueled by autonomy and constant knowledge exchange. Here, you’ll find a team that values your technical opinion and gives you the space to solve genuinely difficult problems.
   

  

 What you’ll get
   

  

**Benefits**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

* 🌇 Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
* 🐶 Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
* 🥐 Wednesdays Tech Breakfasts: Fuel your midweek with tech talks and tasty bites.
* 👾 Tech Demos: Dive into the latest innovations with our regular tech showcases.
* 💻 Modern Tech Stack: Work with cutting-edge technology every day.
* 🏓 Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
* ⏰ Flexible Hours: Hybrid setup with working hours that adapt to your lifestyle.
* 👶 Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
* 🎂 A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!


 Diversity and inclusion are very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
   

  

 Our Recruitment Process
   

  

* 👋 TA Interview — A first conversation to get to know each other
* 🧠 Hiring Manager Interview — A deeper dive into your experience and ways of working
* 💻 Technical Case — A chance to show us how you think and solve problems
* 🤝 Grandfather Interview — A conversation with senior leadership
* 📋 Reference Check — We'll speak to a couple of people who know your work
* 🔍 Background Control — A standard check for all hires in Sweden
* 🎉 Contract Signing — Welcome to Instabee!


*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*
 If you're a seasoned backend engineer who wants to see your work make a real-world impact, we encourage you to apply!

title: Model-Based Development Engineer (MATLAB/Simulink)
description:
**Looking for your next challenge as a Model-Based Development Engineer in the automotive industry?**


ALTEN Sweden is currently seeking an experienced **Model-Based Development Engineer (MATLAB/Simulink)** to join one of our key clients within the automotive sector, working 100% on-site in Gothenburg. You will be part of a highly skilled engineering team developing and validating vehicle functions using model-based methodologies for automotive systems.

 **What do we offer**

* Challenging assignments and continuous learning opportunities.
* A strong engineering culture and collaborative international teams.
* Supportive, coaching leadership and a people-first mindset.
* The possibility to explore various industries where our clients operate.
* A personal training budget for internal or external courses.



**Your main responsibilities**

* Develop and maintain system and software models using **MATLAB/Simulink**
* Apply **Model-Based Development** methodologies within automotive projects
* Use **TargetLink** for production code generation
* Perform simulation, testing, and validation of models
* Support integration of models into embedded automotive systems
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams across the automotive development chain

**Your profile**


We are looking for a technically strong engineer with solid experience in Model-Based Development and a strong interest in automotive systems.

* B.Sc. or M.Sc. in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related technical field
* Around **4 years of professional experience** in Model-Based Development
* Strong hands-on experience with **MATLAB/Simulink**
* Experience with **TargetLink**
* Knowledge of **Python, C, or C++** is considered a strong plus
* Previous experience in the **automotive industry**
* Fluent in **English**, both written and spoken

**About ALTEN**


ALTEN is one of Europe’s largest technology and IT consulting companies with over 57,000 employees in nearly 30 countries. Our engineers carry out complex and highly technical projects throughout the value chain of the most prestigious companies in all sectors, such as Automotive, Defense, Energy & Environment, Industry, Public services & Government and Life Sciences. In Sweden, we are about 1300 committed employees with 9 offices in 9 cities – from Lund in the south to Skellefteå in the north.


For the sixth year in a row, ALTEN has been named one of Sweden’s most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen, an award for employers that offer unique career and development opportunities.


Welcome to read more about us at **alten.se**

 *Please be aware that applications submitted via email or direct messaging will not be considered.*

*For any HR-related questions or request regarding a job application, please select the ‘Recruitment’ category in “Contact us”.*


  
JOBB DETALJER


 13/04/2026


Göteborg
REKRYTERING KONTAKT


 ALTEN Sweden

title: Automation Engineer to Rebl Industries
description:
Are you an automation engineer who loves robotics, thrives in hands-on problem solving and wants to help scale the next generation of AI-powered automation?
  
Join the team that’s redefining industrial automationRebl Industries builds robotic workmates that companies subscribe to instead of buying. Our robots deploy in weeks, learn continuously and take over repetitive, heavy and precision-demanding tasks. With a unique Robot-as-a-Service model, we make automation flexible, scalable and accessible for businesses that want results without the traditional complexity and investment costs of automation projects. We’re a fast-growing, ambitious scale-up working at the intersection of robotics, AI, software and real-world production. Read more about us at www.rebl.industriesWhat you will doAs an Automation Engineer at Rebl, you turn cutting-edge technology into reliable automation. You’ll build and integrate control systems, tune robot performance, test and validate installations, as well as ensure our solutions run smoothly in demanding operational environments. You’ll collaborate closely with mechanical, electrical and software engineers – from early concepts to deployment and continuous improvement as systems scale across customer sites.What we’re looking for
  
University degree in Automation, Mechatronics, Robotics, or a related engineering field.
  
Minimum 5+ years of professional experience in automation, mechatronics or similar engineering roles
  
Proven experience designing, implementing and commissioning automation systems in real-world environments
  
Strong PLC programming skills (Siemens TIA Portal preferred) and hands-on control system knowledge
  
Experience integrating sensors, actuators and mechatronic components into cohesive systems
  
Proficiency in Python for automation, data communication, or system integration
  
Familiarity with CAD and simulation tools to support mechanical and system design
  
Ability to troubleshoot complex systems, optimize performance, and ensure reliable operation in production
  
A proactive problem-solving mentality with the ability to work independently and drive projects forward
  
Fluency in english with professional proficiency in Swedish.
  
  

Your mindsetYou’re pragmatic, curious and energized by solving real-world automation challenges. You move fluidly between design, implementation and hands-on testing. You take ownership, communicate clearly and enjoy collaborating across disciplines. You thrive in a scaling environment where speed matters, structure evolves and every engineer has real influence. Most importantly, you want to build things that work – in production, at scale, with measurable impact.Why Rebl IndustriesAt Rebl Industries, you join a sharp, driven and supportive team where your work has immediate effect. You help define the future of robotic automation — not in theory, but in real industrial use. Your ideas shape both the product and the company as we scale to new markets and new levels of performance.Apply now!In this recruitment process Rebl Industries collaborates with Mpya Sci & Tech. For questions about the position, you are welcome to contact Talent Advisor Marcus Hultberg at +46 723 66 49 43 or marcus.hultberg@mpyascitech.com. We work with ongoing selection so don´t hesitate to apply via www.mpyascitech.com as the position may be filled before last day of application.

Vi fokuserar på din kompetens, inte dina övriga förutsättningar. Vi är öppna för att anpassa rollen eller arbetsplatsen efter dina behov.

title: System Engineer
description:
**Why join us?**

  

We’re on a mission to empower people with disabilities to do what they once did or never thought possible. As the world-leader in assistive communication solutions, we empower our customers to express themselves, connect with the world, and live richer lives.

  

At Tobii Dynavox, you can grow your career within a dynamic, global company that has a clear, impactful purpose - with the flexibility to also do what truly matters to you outside of work. What’s more, you’ll be part of a work culture where collaboration is the norm and individuality is welcomed.

  

As a member of our team, you’ll have the power to innovate for good. You’ll see your ideas in use in new applications, work with the latest technology on leading platforms, and deliver meaningful solutions for our customers.  



  

We are looking for a **System Engineer** to lead the design, development, and integration of complex, regulated medical device hardware from concept through to production. In this role, you will define system architecture, manage cross-functional interfaces across hardware, firmware, and mechanical design, and ensure compliance with medical device regulations and standards. You will translate user and business needs into clear, actionable, and testable system and hardware specifications, with a strong focus on reliability, performance, and manufacturability.

 **In this role you will for example:**

* Define and own system architecture for complex, high reliability communication devices, including interfaces, signal flows, and system partitioning
* Act as technical authority, leading cross functional integration and system bring up across hardware, firmware, and software
* Lead verification, validation, and risk management activities, ensuring compliance with applicable medical device standards and regulations
* Translate user and business requirements into clear, actionable, and testable system and hardware specifications
* Validate system performance through simulations, benchmarking, and environmental testing
* Drive technical innovation and contribute to longterm technology roadmaps
* Collaborate closely with engineering, design, quality, regulatory, product, and manufacturing partners

 **We are looking for someone that has:**

* Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Engineering Physics, Mechanical Engineering, or a related field
* Minimum of 5 years of experience in hardware system engineering or system architecture, preferably within the medical device industry
* Deep technical expertise and broad cross‑functional knowledge across electronics, firmware, and mechanical systems
* Experience working in a regulated medical device or MedTech environment (Previous AAC experience is a strong plus)
* Solid understanding of standards and quality systems such as ISO 13485, IEC 60601, and ISO 14971

**We believe that you are:**

* Able to influence technical teams, drive decisions, and communicate effectively with stakeholders
* An excellent communicator with strong written and verbal skills in English
* A collaborative team player with a willingness to help build and shape a growing team

 **Practical information**


This role is primarily office based, with flexibility to work from home when needed. Some international travel may be required.

**Apply today!**


We believe in empowering individuals - including our own employees - to reach their full potential. So, if you want to change lives while growing your own career, we’d love to hear from you.


**Where we stand:**

We believe diversity not only enriches our workplace culture, but also gives us a strategic advantage. Working with people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives helps us all become better communicators, better problem solvers, and better human beings. Our differences make us stronger.


Tobii Dynavox values equality of opportunity, human dignity, and racial/ethnic and cultural diversity. Tobii Dynavox does not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, disability, age, veteran status, ancestry, or national or ethnic origin.


Equal Opportunity Employer/AA Women/Minorities/Veterans/Disabled

title: Experienced ML System Integration and Test Engineer
description:
**Job ID** 2026-17129


**Date posted** Apr. 13, 2026


**Location** Lund, Sweden


**Category** Software Engineering


  
We are looking for an experienced software/hardware engineer with a strong analytical approach to join the team and help ensure the best quality with most recent Arm ML software, systems and IP.


The successful engineer will be highly flexible, quick to learn and be motivated by the opportunity to understand and improve the quality of future Machine Learning solutions using Arm technology.


Are you our next team member?


Job Description:


As an ML Engineer you will develop test infrastructure for our fully automated test flow, including functional and performance testing, as well as visualisation and report generation of the results.


We use advanced pre-silicon platforms of next-generation systems, to understand new use-cases and significant workloads to ensure Arm IP and systems deliver excellent ML performance and quality.


Required Skills and Experience :

* We’re looking for someone who follows up when something seems off, takes ownership beyond their assigned tasks, and pushes past team limitations to drive the right outcome.
* Great **python** knowledge is essential.
* Comfortable developing on Linux or Mac
* You have experience working with SW development or automated testing.
* You have strong communication skills, inter-cultural awareness and you embrace diversity.


“Nice To Have” Skills and Experience :

* Experience from building test infrastructure
* Experience working with pre-silicon platforms.
* Familiarity with **Docker** and **CI/CD systems** (Jenkins, GitLab, or GitHub).
* Understanding of **ML frameworks, compilers, or model execution flows**.
* Familiarity with data analysis.


In Return:


At Arm, you will enjoy working in a highly stimulating collaborative environment. Our team works closely with other software, hardware and system teams across the company.


You will have a chance to share ideas with and learn new skills from the best engineers in the world. We work in small teams, so your contributions will really make a difference.


#LI-CM1


Accommodations at Arm


At Arm, we want to build extraordinary teams. If you need an adjustment or an accommodation during the recruitment process, please email accommodations@arm.com. To note, by sending us the requested information, you consent to its use by Arm to arrange for appropriate accommodations. All accommodation or adjustment requests will be treated with confidentiality, and information concerning these requests will only be disclosed as necessary to provide the accommodation. Although this is not an exhaustive list, examples of support include breaks between interviews, having documents read aloud, or office accessibility. Please email us about anything we can do to accommodate you during the recruitment process.


Hybrid Working at Arm


Arm’s approach to hybrid working is designed to create a working environment that supports both high performance and personal wellbeing. We believe in bringing people together face to face to enable us to work at pace, whilst recognizing the value of flexibility. Within that framework, we empower groups/teams to determine their own hybrid working patterns, depending on the work and the team’s needs. Details of what this means for each role will be shared upon application. In some cases, the flexibility we can offer is limited by local legal, regulatory, tax, or other considerations, and where this is the case, we will collaborate with you to find the best solution. title: Staff ML System Integration and Test Engineer
description:
**Job ID** 2026-17130


**Date posted** Apr. 13, 2026


**Location** Lund, Sweden


**Category** Software Engineering


  
We are looking for an experienced software/hardware engineer with a strong analytical approach to join the team and help ensure the best quality with most recent Arm ML software, systems and IP.


The successful engineer will be highly flexible, quick to learn and be motivated by the opportunity to understand and improve the quality of future Machine Learning solutions using Arm technology.


Are you our next team member?


Job Description:


As an ML Engineer you will develop test infrastructure for our fully automated test flow, including functional and performance testing, as well as visualisation and report generation of the results.


We use advanced pre-silicon platforms of next-generation systems, to understand new use-cases and significant workloads to ensure Arm IP and systems deliver excellent ML performance and quality.


Required Skills and Experience :

* We’re looking for someone who follows up when something seems off, takes ownership beyond their assigned tasks, and pushes past team limitations to drive the right outcome.
* Great **python** knowledge is essential.
* Comfortable developing on Linux or Mac
* You have experience working with SW development or automated testing.
* You have strong communication skills, inter-cultural awareness and you embrace diversity.


“Nice To Have” Skills and Experience :

* Experience from building test infrastructure
* Experience working with pre-silicon platforms.
* Familiarity with **Docker** and **CI/CD systems** (Jenkins, GitLab, or GitHub).
* Understanding of **ML frameworks, compilers, or model execution flows**.
* Familiarity with data analysis.


In Return:


At Arm, you will enjoy working in a highly stimulating collaborative environment. Our team works closely with other software, hardware and system teams across the company.


You will have a chance to share ideas with and learn new skills from the best engineers in the world. We work in small teams, so your contributions will really make a difference.


#LI-CM1


Accommodations at Arm


At Arm, we want to build extraordinary teams. If you need an adjustment or an accommodation during the recruitment process, please email accommodations@arm.com. To note, by sending us the requested information, you consent to its use by Arm to arrange for appropriate accommodations. All accommodation or adjustment requests will be treated with confidentiality, and information concerning these requests will only be disclosed as necessary to provide the accommodation. Although this is not an exhaustive list, examples of support include breaks between interviews, having documents read aloud, or office accessibility. Please email us about anything we can do to accommodate you during the recruitment process.


Hybrid Working at Arm


Arm’s approach to hybrid working is designed to create a working environment that supports both high performance and personal wellbeing. We believe in bringing people together face to face to enable us to work at pace, whilst recognizing the value of flexibility. Within that framework, we empower groups/teams to determine their own hybrid working patterns, depending on the work and the team’s needs. Details of what this means for each role will be shared upon application. In some cases, the flexibility we can offer is limited by local legal, regulatory, tax, or other considerations, and where this is the case, we will collaborate with you to find the best solution. Please talk to us to find out more about what this could look like for you.

We are a diverse organization of dedicated and innovative individuals, and don’t discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or status as a protected veteran.
